# Define params if they do not exist
```{r params, echo = FALSE}
if (!exists("params")) {
  params <- list(
  output_folder = "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/output/median-Th-MPR-allgrades-25.11/",
  clean_centiles_path = "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/output/median-Th-MPR-allgrades-25.11/data_clean/centiles_distinct_2026-03-18.csv", 
  slip_release_folder = "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/releases_clinical/2025_11_release/"
  )
}
print(params)
``` 

# Controls
```{r setup, echo = TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
# set command
save_tables <- TRUE
plot <- TRUE
save_figs <- TRUE
gamlss_models <- FALSE
global_measure_vol <- "global_eTIV"
global_measure_sa <- "global_SurfaceArea"
global_measure_th <- "global_MeanThickness"
set.seed(42)

output_folder <- params$output_folder
clean_centiles_path <- params$clean_centiles_path
slip_release_folder <- params$slip_release_folder
```

# Load Packages
```{r packages, echo = FALSE}
# Load libraries
require(dplyr)
require(glue)
require(magrittr)
require(readr)
require(stringr)
require(tidyr)
require(scales)
require(mgcv)
require(pbkrtest)
require(gamlssTools) # Margaret' package
require(tibble)
# For figures/plotting
require(ggplot2)
require(gridExtra)
require(ggsegDKT)
require(ggseg)
# require(ggpubr)
require(ggcorrplot)
require(cowplot)
require(egg)
require(interactions)
require(growthstandards)
require(gtsummary)
require(svglite)
require(patchwork)
```

# Define Paths
```{r, echo = TRUE}
# set folder paths
code_path <- "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/"
vars_path <-  "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/output/vars/"

# data paths
qc_metrics_path <- glue("{slip_release_folder}derivatives/recon-all-clinical/fs7.4.1-clinical-reconall-qc.csv")
gamlss_data_path <- "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/braincharts/SLIP/2025_03/code/gamlss/RDS/mpr/DATA.rds"

# output folder
output_folder <- params$output_folder
if (!dir.exists(output_folder)) dir.create(output_folder)
##  output subfolder paths
csv_output_folder <-  paste0(output_folder, "results_csv/")
if (!dir.exists(csv_output_folder)) dir.create(csv_output_folder)
plot_output_folder <- paste0(output_folder, "plots/")
if (!dir.exists(plot_output_folder)) dir.create(plot_output_folder)
plot_output_folder <- paste0(output_folder, "plots/centile_reg_plots/")
if (!dir.exists(plot_output_folder)) dir.create(plot_output_folder)
betas_folder <- paste0(csv_output_folder, "full_betas/")
if (!dir.exists(betas_folder)) dir.create(betas_folder)
dkt_folder <- paste0(csv_output_folder, "dkt_betas/")
if (!dir.exists(dkt_folder)) dir.create(dkt_folder)

```

# Load custom functions
```{r fcts, echo = FALSE}
source(paste0(code_path,"sliding_window.R"))
source("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/visualize_model_bartfct.R")

panel_save <- function(plot, filename, extension, folder, plot_width = 8, plot_height = 10){
  save_name <- paste0(folder, filename, ".", extension)
  ggsave(save_name, plot = plot, dpi = 300, width = plot_width, height = plot_height)
}
```

# Plots specifications
```{r, echo = TRUE}
limits = c(-0.3, 0.3)
low_color = "#4878CF"
mid_color = "white"
high_color = "#D65F5F"
```

# Read in data files
```{r, echo = FALSE}
full_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"all_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
global_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"global_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
vol_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"vol_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
sa_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"sa_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
th_vars <- read.csv(paste0(vars_path,"th_vars.csv")) %>% pull(x)
th_vars_median <- paste0(th_vars, ".median")

full_df <- read.csv(clean_centiles_path) %>% select(-("X"))
full_df <-  full_df %>% select(-(grep("_Z", names(full_df)))) # I don't remember why this is here.
if (gamlss_models == TRUE) {
  gamlss_data <- readRDS(gamlss_data_path)
}

#determine if there is both mpr and median for thickness values
median_th_mpr_flag <- any(grepl(".median", names(full_df)))
```

# Find if any models don't exist, remove from variable list for downstream analysis.
```{r, echo = FALSE}
vars_missing <- full_vars[!(full_vars %in% names(full_df))]
print(paste0("Phenotype Variables Missing in the Data Provided: ", paste(vars_missing, collapse = ", ")))
full_vars <- full_vars[!(full_vars %in% vars_missing)]
global_vars <- global_vars[!(global_vars %in% vars_missing)]
vol_vars <- vol_vars[!(vol_vars %in% vars_missing)]
sa_vars <- sa_vars[!(sa_vars %in% vars_missing)]
th_vars <- th_vars[!(th_vars %in% vars_missing)]
```

# Find any cells with missing data within the centile scores
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (sum(grepl(".median", names(full_df))) > 0){
check_vars <- c(vol_vars, sa_vars, global_vars, th_vars_median, "global_MeanThickness.median")
check_vars <- check_vars[check_vars != "global_MeanThickness"]
missing_data_sessions <- full_df[rowSums(is.na(full_df %>% select(all_of(check_vars)))) > 0, ]$session_id
print(paste0("Number of sessions with any missing centile data: ", length(missing_data_sessions)))
missing_data_sessions_df <- full_df %>% filter(session_id %in% missing_data_sessions) %>% select(any_of(c("session_id", "participant_id", "adjusted_age_in_years", full_vars)))
} else {
check_vars <- c(full_vars)
missing_data_sessions <- full_df[rowSums(is.na(full_df %>% select(all_of(check_vars)))) > 0, ]$session_id
print(paste0("Number of sessions with any missing centile data: ", length(missing_data_sessions)))
missing_data_sessions_df <- full_df %>% filter(session_id %in% missing_data_sessions) %>% select(any_of(c("session_id", "participant_id", "adjusted_age_in_years", full_vars)))
}
# remove sessions with any missing data (especially for calculating CMDs)
full_df <- full_df[!(full_df$session_id %in% missing_data_sessions),]
```

# Numbers for gamlss models
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (exists("gamlss_data")){
  gamlss_data_inc <- gamlss_data %>% filter(INDEX.OB == 1)
  length(unique(gamlss_data_inc$participant_id))
  range(gamlss_data_inc$age_days/365)
}
```

# Deal with QC Variable Naming Difference
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if(!("median_euler_mean" %in% names(full_df))){
    full_df$qc_var <- full_df$euler_mean
} else if("median_euler_mean" %in% names(full_df)){
  full_df$qc_var <- full_df$median_euler_mean
}
```

# Remove Age > 21
```{r, echo = TRUE}
hist(full_df$adjusted_age_in_years)
sum(!is.na(full_df$birth_weight_kg))
sum(!is.na(full_df$gestational_age))
sum(!is.na(full_df$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(full_df$gestational_age))

full_df <- full_df %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_years <= 21)

sum(!is.na(full_df$birth_weight_kg))
sum(!is.na(full_df$gestational_age))
sum(!is.na(full_df$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(full_df$gestational_age))

IQR(full_df$adjusted_age_in_years)
median(full_df$adjusted_age_in_years)
```

# Calculate CMD on non-zscored centiles

## calculate and correlate CMDs with each other
```{r, echo = FALSE}
vol_vars_cortical <- vol_vars[grep("aparc", vol_vars)]
length_names <- length(c(vol_vars_cortical, sa_vars, th_vars))
names.global <- c("global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol")
# Ensure all names are in the same order
names_base <- names(full_df)[grep("aparc_GrayVol", names(full_df))] %>% sub("aparc_GrayVol_","",.) %>%
  gsub("_Z", "", .)
names.vol <- paste0("aparc_GrayVol_",names_base)
names.sa <- paste0("aparc_SurfArea_",names_base)
names.th <- paste0("aparc_ThickAvg_",names_base)
# CMD Calculation
## vol
vol.center <- colMeans(full_df %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.cov_matrix <- cov(full_df %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(full_df %>% select(all_of(names.vol)), vol.center, vol.cov_matrix))
full_df$vol.cmd.og <- vol.md
## sa
sa.center <- colMeans(full_df %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), na.rm = TRUE)
sa.cov_matrix <- cov(full_df %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), use = "complete.obs")
sa.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(full_df %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), sa.center, sa.cov_matrix))
full_df$sa.cmd.og  <- sa.md
## th
th.center <- colMeans(full_df %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_days >= (280+365.25)) 
                      %>%  select(all_of(names.th)), na.rm = TRUE)
th.cov_matrix <- cov(full_df %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_days >= (280+365.25)) 
                     %>% select(all_of(names.th)), use = "complete.obs")
th.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(full_df %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_days >= (280+365.25)) 
                          %>% select(all_of(names.th)), th.center, th.cov_matrix))
full_df[full_df$adjusted_age_in_days >= (280+365.25),"th.cmd.og"]  <- th.md
## global
global.center <- colMeans(full_df %>% select(all_of(names.global)), na.rm = TRUE)
global.cov_matrix <- cov(full_df %>% select(all_of(names.global)), use = "complete.obs")
global.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(full_df %>% select(all_of(names.global)), global.center, global.cov_matrix))
full_df$global.cmd.og  <- global.md

# remove outliers as defined by >5 sd from the mean
# df.zscore <- df.zscore %>% filter(vol.cmd < mean(df.zscore$vol.cmd) + 10*sd(df.zscore$vol.cmd))
rm(vol.center, vol.cov_matrix, vol.md, sa.center, sa.cov_matrix, sa.md, th.center, th.cov_matrix, th.md, global.center, global.cov_matrix, global.md)
```
# Prepare Df for Analysis
## Set 0/1 centiles to min/max value to avoid Inf/-Inf
numbers from gamlssTools pkg
```{r}
complete_centile_vars <- c(full_vars, th_vars_median, "bweight_percentile", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent")

for (x in complete_centile_vars){
  full_df[full_df[,x] == 0 & !is.na(full_df[,x]), x] <- 0.0000000000000000000000001
  full_df[full_df[,x] == 1 & !is.na(full_df[,x]), x] <- 0.99999999999999994
}
```
## zscore centiles (new df)
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# zscore centiles and other variables of interest
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
df.zscore <- full_df %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(full_vars, th_vars_median, "bweight_percentile", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent")), qnorm)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg", "age_at_scan", "age_years", "adjusted_age_in_days", "adjusted_age_in_years", "qc_var", "euler_mean_mpr", "median_euler_mean", "vol.cmd.og", "sa.cmd.og", "th.cmd.og")), ~as.numeric(scale(.x))))
} else {
  df.zscore <- full_df %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(full_vars, "bweight_percentile")), qnorm)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c("gestational_age", "birth_weight_kg", "age_at_scan", "age_years", "adjusted_age_in_years", "adjusted_age_in_days", "qc_var", "vol.cmd.og", "sa.cmd.og", "th.cmd.og")),~as.numeric(scale(.x))))
}
# set sex and preterm as factor
df.zscore$sex <- as.factor(full_df$sex)
df.zscore$preterm <- as.factor(full_df$preterm)
```

## find Inf cells, make a table of N per phenotype, then convert to NaN
should be none now
```{r, echo = FALSE}
inf_nan_table <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[c(full_vars, "bweight_percentile")], function(x){
  c(inf = sum(is.infinite(x)), nan = sum(is.nan(x)))
})))
max(inf_nan_table$inf)
max(inf_nan_table$nan)

inf_nan_table %>% filter(inf > 0)
```


# Calculate CMD on centiles post-zscoring

## calculate and correlate CMDs with each other
```{r, echo = FALSE}
vol_vars_cortical <- vol_vars[grep("aparc", vol_vars)]
length_names <- length(c(vol_vars_cortical, sa_vars, th_vars))
names.global <- c("global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol")
# Ensure all names are in the same order
names_base <- names(df.zscore)[grep("aparc_GrayVol", names(df.zscore))] %>% sub("aparc_GrayVol_","",.) %>%
  gsub("_Z", "", .)
names.vol <- paste0("aparc_GrayVol_",names_base)
names.sa <- paste0("aparc_SurfArea_",names_base)
names.th <- paste0("aparc_ThickAvg_",names_base)
# CMD Calculation
## vol
vol.center <- colMeans(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.vol)))
vol.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.vol)), vol.center, vol.cov_matrix))
df.zscore$vol.cmd <- vol.md
## sa
sa.center <- colMeans(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), na.rm = TRUE)
sa.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), use = "complete.obs")
sa.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.sa)), sa.center, sa.cov_matrix))
df.zscore$sa.cmd <- sa.md
## th
th.center <- colMeans(df.zscore %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_days >= as.vector(((280+365.25)-mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days))/sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)))
                      %>%  select(all_of(names.th)), na.rm = TRUE)
th.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_days >= as.vector(((280+365.25)-mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days))/sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)))
                     %>% select(all_of(names.th)), use = "complete.obs")
th.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_days >= as.vector(((280+365.25)-mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days))/sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)))
                          %>% select(all_of(names.th)), th.center, th.cov_matrix))
df.zscore[df.zscore$adjusted_age_in_days >= as.numeric(((280+365.25)-mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days))/sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)),"th.cmd"]  <- th.md
## global
global.center <- colMeans(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.global)), na.rm = TRUE)
global.cov_matrix <- cov(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.global)), use = "complete.obs")
global.md <- sqrt(mahalanobis(df.zscore %>% select(all_of(names.global)), global.center, global.cov_matrix))
df.zscore$global.cmd <- global.md

# remove outliers as defined by >5 sd from the mean
# df.zscore <- df.zscore %>% filter(vol.cmd < mean(df.zscore$vol.cmd) + 10*sd(df.zscore$vol.cmd))

# correlations between CMDs across three centiles
cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd, df.zscore$sa.cmd)
cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd, df.zscore$th.cmd)
cor.test(df.zscore$sa.cmd, df.zscore$th.cmd)

# Plots for CMD correlations
(vol_sa_cmd <- ggplot(data = df.zscore, mapping = aes(x = vol.cmd, y = sa.cmd)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "gray") + 
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "magenta") +
  theme_minimal() + labs (x = "Volume CMD", y = "Surface Area CMD") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 18)))

(vol_th_cmd <- ggplot(data = df.zscore, mapping = aes(x = vol.cmd, y = th.cmd)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "gray") + 
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "magenta") +
  theme_minimal() + labs (x = "Volume CMD", y = "Cortical Thickness CMD") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 18)))


(sa_th_cmd <- ggplot(data = df.zscore, mapping = aes(x = sa.cmd, y = th.cmd)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "gray") + 
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "magenta") +
  theme_minimal()  + labs (x = "Surface Area CMD", y = "Cortical Thickness CMD")+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 18)))


if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(vol_sa_cmd, "vol-sa-cmd", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(vol_th_cmd, "vol-th-cmd", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(sa_th_cmd, "sa-th-cmd", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

## correlations between CMDs and centile scores
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# volume
cor_matrix <- cor(df.zscore[,c(vol_vars_cortical, "vol.cmd")], use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
p_mat <- cor_pmat(df.zscore[,c(vol_vars_cortical, "vol.cmd")])

cor_vol.cmd <- cor_matrix[, "vol.cmd" , drop = FALSE]
p_vol.cmd <- p_mat[, "vol.cmd" , drop = FALSE]

ggcorrplot(
  cor_vol.cmd,
  p.mat = p_vol.cmd,
  type = "lower",
  insig = "blank",
  lab = FALSE
)

# sa
cor_matrix <- cor(df.zscore[,c(sa_vars, "sa.cmd")], use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
p_mat <- cor_pmat(df.zscore[,c(sa_vars, "sa.cmd")])

cor_sa.cmd <- cor_matrix[, "sa.cmd" , drop = FALSE]
p_sa.cmd <- p_mat[, "sa.cmd" , drop = FALSE]

ggcorrplot(
  cor_sa.cmd,
  p.mat = p_sa.cmd,
  type = "lower",
  insig = "blank",
  lab = FALSE
)

# th
cor_matrix <- cor(df.zscore[,c(th_vars, "th.cmd")], use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
p_mat <- cor_pmat(df.zscore[,c(th_vars, "th.cmd")])

cor_th.cmd <- cor_matrix[, "th.cmd" , drop = FALSE]
p_th.cmd <- p_mat[, "th.cmd" , drop = FALSE]

ggcorrplot(
  cor_th.cmd,
  p.mat = p_th.cmd,
  type = "lower",
  insig = "blank",
  lab = FALSE
)
```

# Specify subset dfs
```{r, echo = TRUE}
## create dfs grouped by age at scan and other subsets for sensitivity analyses
df.zscore_young <- df.zscore %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_years < mean(df.zscore$adjusted_age_in_years))
df.zscore_young_overOne <- df.zscore %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_years < mean(df.zscore$adjusted_age_in_years) & adjusted_age_in_days >= as.vector(((280+365.25)-mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days))/sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)))
df.zscore_old <- df.zscore %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_years > mean(df.zscore$adjusted_age_in_years))
df.zscore_overOne <- df.zscore %>% filter(adjusted_age_in_days >= as.vector(((280+365.25)-mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days))/sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)))
df.zscore_overOne_noVPM <- df.zscore_overOne %>% filter(preterm != "VPM" | is.na(preterm))
```

# CMD Correlations with GA and BW

## on CMDs pre-zscoring
CMDs are z-scored after calculation
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd.og, df.zscore$gestational_age)
cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd.og, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)

cor.test(df.zscore$sa.cmd.og, df.zscore$gestational_age)
cor.test(df.zscore$sa.cmd.og, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)

cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd.og, df.zscore$gestational_age)
cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd.og, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd.og, df.zscore$bweight_percentile)

cor.test(df.zscore$global.cmd.og, df.zscore$gestational_age)
cor.test(df.zscore$global.cmd.og, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
```

## on CMDs post-zscoring
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd, df.zscore$gestational_age)
cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)

cor.test(df.zscore$sa.cmd, df.zscore$gestational_age)
cor.test(df.zscore$sa.cmd, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)

cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd, df.zscore$gestational_age)
cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
cor.test(df.zscore$th.cmd, df.zscore$bweight_percentile)

cor.test(df.zscore$global.cmd, df.zscore$gestational_age)
cor.test(df.zscore$global.cmd, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)

# BW-VolumeCMD
bw_N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore$vol.cmd))

cor_volCMD_bw <- cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
## plot
volCMD_bw_r <- signif(cor_volCMD_bw$estimate, 3)
volCMD_bw_p <- signif(cor_volCMD_bw$p.value, 3)

(cor_volCMD_bw_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(birth_weight_kg, vol.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 3, y = 13,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",volCMD_bw_r, "; p=", volCMD_bw_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Birthweight (z-scored), N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Cortical Volume CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))
if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(cor_volCMD_bw_plot, "cor-volCMD-bw", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}

# GA-VolumeCMD
ga_N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore$vol.cmd))

cor_volCMD_ga <- cor.test(df.zscore$vol.cmd, df.zscore$gestational_age)
## plot
volCMD_ga_r <- signif(cor_volCMD_ga$estimate, 3)
volCMD_ga_p <- signif(cor_volCMD_ga$p.value, 3)

(cor_volCMD_ga_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(gestational_age, vol.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 1, y = 30,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",volCMD_ga_r, "; p=", volCMD_ga_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Gestational Age (z-scored), N = ", ga_N),
    y = "Cortical Volume CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  ))
if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(cor_volCMD_ga_plot, "cor-volcmd-ga", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}

# BW-SurfaceAreaCMD
bw_N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore$sa.cmd))

cor_saCMD_bw <- cor.test(df.zscore$sa.cmd, df.zscore$birth_weight_kg)
## plot
saCMD_bw_r <- signif(cor_saCMD_bw$estimate, 3)
saCMD_bw_p <- signif(cor_saCMD_bw$p.value, 3)

(cor_saCMD_bw_plot <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(birth_weight_kg, sa.cmd)) +
  geom_point(color = "#8C7FAF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#8C7FAF") +
  annotate("label",
           x = 3, y = 13,
           label.size = 0,
           label = paste0("r=",saCMD_bw_r, "; p=", saCMD_bw_p)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("Birthweight (z-scored), N = ", bw_N),
    y = "Cortical Surface Area CMD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()

}
```

# Analyses with global phenotypes (euler mean QC score as covariate)

## Define global vars of interest
```{r, echo = TRUE}
global_vars_totest <- c("global_eTIV", "global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol","global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness")
```
## simple linear regression
### GA
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
    col = df.zscore[,x]
  lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore$gestational_age + df.zscore$qc_var)
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    col = df.zscore_overOne[,x]
    lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age + df.zscore_overOne$qc_var)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  x = df.zscore_overOne$global_MeanThickness
    lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age + df.zscore_overOne$euler_mean_mpr)
    summary <- summary(lm)
    ga_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[2,1]
    ga_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_p"] <- summary$coefficients[2,4]
    ga_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_se"] <- summary$coefficients[2,2]
  }

ga_reg_table_global$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga_reg_table_global$ga_p, method = "BH")

ga_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)
range(ga_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(ga_beta))
```

### BW
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  col = df.zscore[,x]
  lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore$birth_weight_kg + df.zscore$qc_var)
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    col = df.zscore_overOne[,x]
    lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg + df.zscore_overOne$qc_var)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  x = df.zscore_overOne$global_MeanThickness
    lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg + df.zscore_overOne$euler_mean_mpr)
    summary <- summary(lm)
    bw_reg_table_global[rownames(bw_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[2,1]
    bw_reg_table_global[rownames(bw_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_p"] <- summary$coefficients[2,4]
    bw_reg_table_global[rownames(bw_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_se"] <- summary$coefficients[2,2]
  }

bw_reg_table_global$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw_reg_table_global$bw_p, method = "BH")

bw_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)
range(bw_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(bw_beta))
```

### Visualize/Figure Panel
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#  Add phenotype column from rownames
ga_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(ga_reg_table_global)
bw_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(bw_reg_table_global)

#  Add model identifiers + rename to common column names
ga_reg_table_global <- ga_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Gestational Age",
         beta = ga_beta,
         se   = ga_se,
         p_adj    = ga_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

bw_reg_table_global <- bw_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Birthweight",
         beta = bw_beta,
         se   = bw_se,
         p_adj    = bw_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

#  Combine and arrange by specific order of global phenotypes
df <- bind_rows(ga_reg_table_global, bw_reg_table_global) %>%
  mutate(phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = c("global_eTIV", "global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol",
                                                  "global_SubCortGrayVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol",
                                                  "global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness"))) %>% arrange(phenotype)

#  Labeling for phenotypes on plot
phenotype_labs <- c(
 global_eTIV = "Intracranial Volume",
 global_MeanThickness = "Mean Cortical Thickness",
 global_VentricleChoroidVol = "Ventricular Volume",
 global_SurfaceArea = "Total Surface Area",
 global_CortexVol = "Cortical Gray Matter Volume",
 global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol = "Cerebral White Matter Volume",
 global_SubCortGrayVol = "Subcortical Gray Matter Volume"
)

#  Plot
(global_betas_plot <- ggplot(df, aes(x = beta, y = phenotype)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = model, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Gestational Age" = 16, "Birthweight" = 17),
                       name = "") +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.3)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, labels = phenotype_labs) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate, QC covar") +
    ylab(""))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(global_betas_plot, "global-betas-gabw", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```


## linear interaction with age
### GA
```{r, echo = FALSE}
gabyage_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
    col = df.zscore[,x]
  lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore$gestational_age*df.zscore$adjusted_age_in_days + df.zscore$qc_var)
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    col = df.zscore_overOne[,x]
    lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age*df.zscore_overOne$adjusted_age_in_days + df.zscore_overOne$qc_var)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
    age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
    gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  x = df.zscore_overOne$global_MeanThickness
    lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age*df.zscore_overOne$adjusted_age_in_days + df.zscore_overOne$euler_mean_mpr)
    summary <- summary(lm)
    gabyage_reg_table_global[rownames(gabyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[2,1]
    gabyage_reg_table_global[rownames(gabyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_p"] <- summary$coefficients[2,4]
    gabyage_reg_table_global[rownames(gabyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_se"] <- summary$coefficients[2,2]
    gabyage_reg_table_global[rownames(gabyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "age_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[3,1]
    gabyage_reg_table_global[rownames(gabyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "age_p"] <- summary$coefficients[3,4]
    gabyage_reg_table_global[rownames(gabyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "age_se"] <- summary$coefficients[3,2]
    gabyage_reg_table_global[rownames(gabyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "gabyage_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[5,1]
    gabyage_reg_table_global[rownames(gabyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "gabyage_p"] <- summary$coefficients[5,4]
    gabyage_reg_table_global[rownames(gabyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "gabyage_se"] <- summary$coefficients[5,2]
  }

gabyage_reg_table_global$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_reg_table_global$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage_reg_table_global$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_reg_table_global$age_p, method = "BH")
gabyage_reg_table_global$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_reg_table_global$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA Main - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Age Main significant results after FDR (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

### BW
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
    col = df.zscore[,x]
  lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore$birth_weight*df.zscore$adjusted_age_in_days + df.zscore$qc_var)
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    col = df.zscore_overOne[,x]
    lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight*df.zscore_overOne$adjusted_age_in_days + df.zscore_overOne$qc_var)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
    age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
    bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  x = df.zscore_overOne$global_MeanThickness
    lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight*df.zscore_overOne$adjusted_age_in_days + df.zscore_overOne$euler_mean_mpr)
    summary <- summary(lm)
    bwbyage_reg_table_global[rownames(bwbyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[2,1]
    bwbyage_reg_table_global[rownames(bwbyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_p"] <- summary$coefficients[2,4]
    bwbyage_reg_table_global[rownames(bwbyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_se"] <- summary$coefficients[2,2]
    bwbyage_reg_table_global[rownames(bwbyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "age_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[3,1]
    bwbyage_reg_table_global[rownames(bwbyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "age_p"] <- summary$coefficients[3,4]
    bwbyage_reg_table_global[rownames(bwbyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "age_se"] <- summary$coefficients[3,2]
    bwbyage_reg_table_global[rownames(bwbyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bwbyage_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[5,1]
    bwbyage_reg_table_global[rownames(bwbyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bwbyage_p"] <- summary$coefficients[5,4]
    bwbyage_reg_table_global[rownames(bwbyage_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bwbyage_se"] <- summary$coefficients[5,2]
  }

bwbyage_reg_table_global$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_reg_table_global$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage_reg_table_global$age_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_reg_table_global$age_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage_reg_table_global$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_reg_table_global$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for BW Main - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Age Main significant results after FDR (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(age_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for BW x Age- NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for BW x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage_reg_table_global %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```



## nonlinear interaction with age
### GA

#### fit models
```{r, echo = FALSE}
gabyage_sp_models_global <- lapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(gestational_age) + s(adjusted_age_in_days) + ti(gestational_age, adjusted_age_in_days) + qc_var"))
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore)
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore_overOne)
      if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(gestational_age) + s(adjusted_age_in_days) + ti(gestational_age, adjusted_age_in_days) + euler_mean_mpr"))
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore_overOne)
    }
  }

  return(gam_model)
  })

gabyage_sp_models_global <- setNames(gabyage_sp_models_global, global_vars_totest)

gabyage_sp_gam_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(gabyage_sp_models_global,function(x) {
  summary <- summary(x$gam)
  c(ga_edf = summary$s.table[1,1], ga_p = summary$s.table[1,4],
    age_edf = summary$s.table[2,1], age_p = summary$s.table[2,4],
    gabyage_edf = summary$s.table[3,1], gabyage_p = summary$s.table[3,4])
  })))

rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global) <- global_vars_totest

gabyage_sp_gam_table_global$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

#### Visualize models (for curiosity's sake)
```{r}
font_size <- 16
theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "sans",base_size = font_size))
line_size <- 1.5
point_size <- 2
source("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/visualize_model_bartfct.R")

mu_age <- mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_age <- sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days, na.rm = TRUE)

mu_ga <- mean(full_df$gestational_age, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_ga <- sd(full_df$gestational_age, na.rm = TRUE)

gabyage_sp_plots_global <- lapply(gabyage_sp_models_global, function(x) {
  
  low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.10)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25

  high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                      "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                            probs = c(.90)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  model_plot <- visualize_model(
  modobj = x,
  smooth_var = "gestational_age",
  int_var = "adjusted_age_in_days",
  plabels = "continuous interaction",
  derivative_plot = F)

  if(grepl("Thick",x$gam$pterms[[2]])) {
    low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore_overOne[!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age),
                                                 "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                               probs = c(.05)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
    
    mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore_overOne[!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
      

    high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore_overOne[!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age),
                                              "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                            probs = c(.95)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  }
  plot_colors <- ggplot_build(model_plot)$plot$scales$get_scales("fill")$palette(1)
  
  model_plot <- model_plot + 
    labs(x="Gestational Age",
         title = glue("{x$gam$terms[[2]]}"),
                  fill = "Age") +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) round(x * sd_ga + mu_ga, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c(paste0("Low: ",
                                      round(low_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("Mid: ",
                                      round(mid_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("High: ",
                                      round(high_age_label,1),"yrs")), 
                    values = plot_colors) +
   scale_color_gradientn(colors = plot_colors,
    labels = function(x) round((x * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25, 1),
    name = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) signif(pnorm(y)*100, 3))
  
  return(model_plot)
})

gabyage_sp_plots_global <- setNames(gabyage_sp_plots_global, global_vars_totest)


wrap_plots(gabyage_sp_plots_global[1:4], ncol = 2)
wrap_plots(gabyage_sp_plots_global[5:7], ncol = 2)
```

# Analyses with global phenotypes (euler mean QC score and weight/height at encounter as covariate)

## Define global vars of interest
```{r, echo = TRUE}
global_vars_totest <- c("global_eTIV", "global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol","global_SurfaceArea",
                        "global_MeanThickness")
```

## GA
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.wh_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  col = df.zscore[,x]
  lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore$gestational_age + df.zscore$qc_var + df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent )
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    col = df.zscore_overOne[,x]
    lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age + df.zscore_overOne$qc_var + df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  x = df.zscore_overOne$global_MeanThickness
    lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age + df.zscore_overOne$euler_mean_mpr + df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent)
    summary <- summary(lm)
    ga.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[2,1]
    ga.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_p"] <- summary$coefficients[2,4]
    ga.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "ga_se"] <- summary$coefficients[2,2]
  }

ga.wh_reg_table_global$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.wh_reg_table_global$ga_p, method = "BH")

ga.wh_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)
range(ga.wh_reg_table_global %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(ga_beta))
```

## BW
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.wh_reg_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  col = df.zscore[,x]
  lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore$birth_weight_kg + df.zscore$qc_var + df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent )
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    col = df.zscore_overOne[,x]
    lm <- lm(col ~ df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg + df.zscore_overOne$qc_var + df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  x = df.zscore_overOne$global_MeanThickness
    lm <- lm(x ~ df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg + df.zscore_overOne$euler_mean_mpr + df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent + df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent)
    summary <- summary(lm)
    bw.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_beta"] <- summary$coefficients[2,1]
    bw.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_p"] <- summary$coefficients[2,4]
    bw.wh_reg_table_global[rownames(ga_reg_table_global) == "global_MeanThickness", "bw_se"] <- summary$coefficients[2,2]
  }


bw.wh_reg_table_global$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.wh_reg_table_global$bw_p, method = "BH")

bw.wh_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)
range(bw.wh_reg_table_global %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05) %>% select(bw_beta))
```

## Visualize/Figure Panel
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#  Add phenotype column from rownames
ga.wh_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(ga.wh_reg_table_global)
bw.wh_reg_table_global$phenotype <- rownames(bw.wh_reg_table_global)

#  Add model identifiers + rename to common column names
ga.wh_reg_table_global <- ga.wh_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Gestational Age",
         beta = ga_beta,
         se   = ga_se,
         p_adj    = ga_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

bw.wh_reg_table_global <- bw.wh_reg_table_global %>%
  mutate(model = "Birthweight",
         beta = bw_beta,
         se   = bw_se,
         p_adj    = bw_p_adj) %>%
    mutate(sig = p_adj < 0.05,
          color = case_when(
            sig & beta > 0 ~ "#c87a7a",   #  muted red
            sig & beta < 0 ~ "#7293b0",   #  muted blue
            TRUE ~ "gray70"))

#  Combine and arrange by specific order of global phenotypes
df.wh <- bind_rows(ga.wh_reg_table_global, bw.wh_reg_table_global) %>%
  mutate(phenotype = factor(phenotype, levels = c("global_eTIV", "global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol",
                                                  "global_SubCortGrayVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol",
                                                  "global_SurfaceArea", "global_MeanThickness"))) %>% arrange(phenotype)

#  Labeling for phenotypes on plot
phenotype_labs <- c(
 global_eTIV = "Intracranial Volume",
 global_MeanThickness = "Mean Cortical Thickness",
 global_VentricleChoroidVol = "Ventricular Volume",
 global_SurfaceArea = "Total Surface Area",
 global_CortexVol = "Cortical Gray Matter Volume",
 global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol = "Cerebral White Matter Volume",
 global_SubCortGrayVol = "Subcortical Gray Matter Volume"
)

#  Plot
(global.wh_betas_plot <- ggplot(df.wh, aes(x = beta, y = phenotype)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = model, color = color), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = beta - se, xmax = beta + se, color = color), height = 0.2) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Gestational Age" = 16, "Birthweight" = 17),
                       name = "") +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.16, 0.3)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev, labels = phenotype_labs) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate, QC and W/H covar") +
    ylab(""))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(global.wh_betas_plot, "global-wh-betas-gabw", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

# Analyses with global phenotypes, test non-linear vs linear

## GA

#### fit models
```{r, echo = FALSE}
gabyage_sp_models_global <- lapply(global_vars_totest, function(x) {
  form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(gestational_age) + qc_var"))
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore)
  if(grepl("Thick", x)) {
    gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore_overOne)
      if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(gestational_age) + s(adjusted_age_in_days) + ti(gestational_age, adjusted_age_in_days) + euler_mean_mpr"))
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore_overOne)
    }
  }

  return(gam_model)
  })

gabyage_sp_models_global <- setNames(gabyage_sp_models_global, global_vars_totest)

gabyage_sp_gam_table_global <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(gabyage_sp_models_global,function(x) {
  summary <- summary(x$gam)
  c(ga_edf = summary$s.table[1,1], ga_p = summary$s.table[1,4],
    age_edf = summary$s.table[2,1], age_p = summary$s.table[2,4],
    gabyage_edf = summary$s.table[3,1], gabyage_p = summary$s.table[3,4])
  })))

rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global) <- global_vars_totest

gabyage_sp_gam_table_global$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_global %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

```{r}
                            probs = c(.90)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  model_plot <- visualize_model(
  modobj = x,

  if(grepl("Thick",x$gam$pterms[[2]])) {

                               probs = c(.05)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
    
    mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore_overOne[!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
      

    high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore_overOne[!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age),
                                              "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                            probs = c(.95)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  }
  plot_colors <- ggplot_build(model_plot)$plot$scales$get_scales("fill")$palette(1)
  
  model_plot <- model_plot + 
    labs(x="Gestational Age",
         title = glue("{x$gam$terms[[2]]}"),
                  fill = "Age") +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) round(x * sd_ga + mu_ga, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c(paste0("Low: ",
                                      round(low_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("Mid: ",
                                      round(mid_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("High: ",
                                      round(high_age_label,1),"yrs")), 
                    values = plot_colors) +
   scale_color_gradientn(colors = plot_colors,
    labels = function(x) round((x * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25, 1),
    name = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) signif(pnorm(y)*100, 3))
  
  return(model_plot)
})

gabyage_sp_plots_global <- setNames(gabyage_sp_plots_global, global_vars_totest)


wrap_plots(gabyage_sp_plots_global[1:4], ncol = 2)
wrap_plots(gabyage_sp_plots_global[5:7], ncol = 2)
```
 
# Analyses with regional phenotypes (no covariates, full available sample)

## GA

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(ga_vol), perl = TRUE)

ga_vol$label <- rownames(ga_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>% 
  sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% 
  sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

ga_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", ga_vol$label[cols_edit])

ga_vol_sig_MC <- ga_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga_vol_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga_vol
name <- "ga_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <- dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(ga_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga_vol_noplot <- ga_vol_sig_MC[!(ga_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA Volume"))

(ga_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "GA Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga_dkt_vol_plot, "ga-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(ga_aseg_vol_plot , "ga-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(ga_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(ga_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(ga_vol_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- ga_vol_sig_MC[order(ga_vol_sig_MC$ga_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_ga_vol <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_ga_vol[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_ga_vol[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(x = gestational_age, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Gestational Age (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_ga_vol[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```


####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[4,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[4,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[4,2])
})))

gabyage_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage_vol$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_vol$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(gabyage_vol), perl = TRUE)

gabyage_vol$label <- rownames(gabyage_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

gabyage_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", gabyage_vol$label[cols_edit])

gabyage_vol_sig_MC <- gabyage_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(gabyage_vol_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- gabyage_vol
name <- "gabyage_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(gabyage_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(gabyage_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(gabyage_vol_noplot <- gabyage_vol_sig_MC[!(gabyage_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(gabyage_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots

  geom_brain(atlas = dk,

             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(gabyage_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
vars <- rownames(gabyage_vol_sig_MC[order(-(gabyage_vol_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("aseg_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("X", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days, df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = gestational_age, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("gabyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[4,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga_th_median$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga_th_median$ga_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(ga_th_median %>% filter(ga_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(ga_th_median %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
ga_th_median_sig_MC <- ga_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(ga_th_median))) %>%
  filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

ga_th_subset <- ga_th[rownames(ga_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(ga_th_median_sig_MC)),]
ga_th_subset <- ga_th_subset %>% mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

ga_th_sig_all <- rbind(ga_th_median_sig_MC, ga_th_subset)

(ga_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(ga_th_sig_all, aes(x = ga_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ga_beta - ga_se, xmax = ga_beta + ga_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate GA Univ") +
    ylab(""))

(ga_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(ga_th_sig_all, aes(x = ga_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for GA Univ") +
    ylab(""))

ga_compare_plot <- ga_beta_compare_plot + ga_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga_compare_plot, "ga-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}

}

ga_compare_plot
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga_th$label <- rownames(ga_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

ga_th_sig_MC <- ga_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga_th_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga_th
name <- "ga_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga_th_noplot <- ga_th_sig_MC[!(ga_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga_dkt_th_plot, "ga-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(ga_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(ga_th_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(ga_th_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- ga_th_sig_MC[order(abs(ga_th_sig_MC$ga_beta), decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_ga_th <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  print(i)
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  print(pheno)
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_ga_th)[i] <- pheno
  scatterplots_ga_th[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(x = gestational_age, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Gestational Age (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_ga_th[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[4,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[4,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[4,2])
})))

gabyage_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage_th$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_th$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage_th %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_th %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_th %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[4,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[4,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[4,2])
})))

gabyage_th_median$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_th_median$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage_th_median$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_th_median$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage_th_median %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_th_median %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_th_median %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
print(glue("N for MPR thickness: {sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))}"))
print(glue("N for Median thickness: {sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))}"))
gabyage_th_median_sig_MC <- gabyage_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(gabyage_th_median))) %>%
  filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)


gabyage_th_subset<- gabyage_th[rownames(gabyage_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(gabyage_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

gabyage_th_sig_all <- rbind(gabyage_th_median_sig_MC, gabyage_th_subset)

(gabyage_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(gabyage_th_sig_all, aes(x = gabyage_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = gabyage_beta - gabyage_se, xmax = gabyage_beta + gabyage_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate GA x Age") +
    ylab(""))

(gabyage_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(gabyage_th_sig_all, aes(x = gabyage_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for GA x Age") +
    ylab(""))

gabyage_compare_plot <- gabyage_beta_compare_plot + gabyage_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage_compare_plot, "gabyage-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}
}

gabyage_compare_plot 
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(gabyage_th_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
# plots

  geom_brain(atlas = dk,
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(gabyage_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
vars <- rownames(gabyage_th_sig_MC[order(-(gabyage_th_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days, df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = gestational_age, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("gabyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[4,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

## BW

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw_vol$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw_vol$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bw_vol), perl = TRUE)

bw_vol$label <- rownames(bw_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bw_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bw_vol$label[cols_edit])

bw_vol_sig_MC <- bw_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw_vol_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw_vol
name <- "bw_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}

plot_data_aseg <- merge(bw_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw_vol_noplot <- bw_vol_sig_MC[!(bw_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW Volume"))

(bw_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +

panel_save(bw_aseg_vol_plot , "bw-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(bw_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(bw_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(bw_vol_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- bw_vol_sig_MC[order(bw_vol_sig_MC$bw_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_bw_vol <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_bw_vol[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_bw_vol[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(x = birth_weight_kg, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Gestational Age (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_bw_vol[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[4,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[4,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[4,2])
})))

bwbyage_vol$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_vol$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage_vol$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_vol$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bwbyage_vol), perl = TRUE)

bwbyage_vol$label <- rownames(bwbyage_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bwbyage_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bwbyage_vol$label[cols_edit])

bwbyage_vol_sig_MC <- bwbyage_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwbyage_vol
name <- "bwbyage_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage_vol_noplot <- bwbyage_vol_sig_MC[!(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwbyage_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge Volume"))

(bwbyage_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BWxAge Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage_dkt_vol_plot, "bwbyage-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(bwbyage_aseg_vol_plot , "bwbyage-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
vars <- rownames(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC[order(-(bwbyage_vol_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("aseg_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("X", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days, df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = birth_weight_kg, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("bwbyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[4,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

### Surface Area

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_SurfArea_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw_sa$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw_sa$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw_sa$label <- rownames(bw_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

bw_sa_sig_MC <- bw_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw_sa
name <- "bw_surfArea.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw_sa_noplot <- bw_sa_sig_MC[!(bw_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw_dkt_sa_plot, "bw-dkt-sa", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### Scatterplot for top betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(bw_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
top_n = if(dim(bw_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 10) {10} else {dim(bw_sa_sig_MC)[1]}
top <- bw_sa_sig_MC[order(bw_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta, decreasing = TRUE)[1:top_n],]
scatterplots_bw_sa <- vector(mode = "list", length = top_n)
for(i in 1:top_n){
  pheno <- rownames(top)[i]
  title <- top$label[i]
  names(scatterplots_bw_sa[i]) <- pheno
  scatterplots_bw_sa[[i]] <- ggplot(df.zscore, aes(x = birth_weight_kg, y = !!sym(pheno))) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Gestational Age (z-scored)", y = "Centile (z-scored)", title = title)
}

nCol <- 2
nRow <- 2
breaks <- c(seq(from = 0, to = top_n , by = (nCol*nRow)), top_n) %>% unique(.)
for(k in 1:(length(breaks)-1)){
  start <- breaks[k]+1
  end <- breaks[k+1]
  do.call("grid.arrange", c(scatterplots_bw_sa[start:end], ncol=nCol))
}
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[4,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[4,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[4,2])
})))
```
