### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw_th_median$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw_th_median$bw_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bw_th_median %>% filter(bw_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bw_th_median %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
bw_th_median_sig_MC <- bw_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(bw_th_median))) %>%
  filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

bw_th_subset<- bw_th[rownames(bw_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(bw_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

bw_th_sig_all <- rbind(bw_th_median_sig_MC, bw_th_subset)

(bw_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(bw_th_sig_all, aes(x = bw_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = bw_beta - bw_se, xmax = bw_beta + bw_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate BW Univ") +
    ylab(""))

(bw_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(bw_th_sig_all, aes(x = bw_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for BW Univ") +
    ylab(""))

bw_compare_plot <- bw_beta_compare_plot + bw_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw_compare_plot, "bw-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}
}

bw_compare_plot
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw_th$label <- rownames(bw_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw_th_sig_MC <- bw_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw_th_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  title <- top$label[i]
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage_th_median$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_th_median$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage_th_median$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_th_median$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage_th_median %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage_th_median %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage_th_median %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### compare
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
bwbyage_th_median_sig_MC <- bwbyage_th_median %>% 
  mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(bwbyage_th_median))) %>%
  filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

bwbyage_th_subset<- bwbyage_th[rownames(bwbyage_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(bwbyage_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

bwbyage_th_sig_all <- rbind(bwbyage_th_median_sig_MC, bwbyage_th_subset)

(bwbyage_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(bwbyage_th_sig_all, aes(x = bwbyage_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = bwbyage_beta - bwbyage_se, xmax = bwbyage_beta + bwbyage_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate bw x Age") +
    ylab(""))

(bwbyage_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(bwbyage_th_sig_all, aes(x = bwbyage_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for bw x Age") +
    ylab(""))

bwbyage_compare_plot <- bwbyage_beta_compare_plot + bwbyage_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage_compare_plot, "bwbyage-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}
}

bwbyage_compare_plot
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage_th$label <- rownames(bwbyage_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)
  
bwbyage_th_sig_MC <- bwbyage_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage_th_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwbyage_th
name <- "bwbyage_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bwbyage_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage_th_noplot <- bwbyage_th_sig_MC[!(bwbyage_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwbyage_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage_dkt_th_plot, "bwbyage-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(bwbyage_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
vars <- rownames(bwbyage_th_sig_MC[order(-(bwbyage_th_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days, df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = birth_weight_kg, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("bwbyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[4,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

####  group by age and check bw on thickness effect

##### young

###### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_young$birth_weight_kg))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw_th_young <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_young[, which(names(df.zscore_young) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg, data = df.zscore_young)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw_th_young$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw_th_young$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw_th_young %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

# Analyses with regional phenotypes (euler score QC covariate)
## GA with QC covariate

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + qc_var, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(ga.qc_vol), perl = TRUE)

ga.qc_vol$label <- rownames(ga.qc_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

ga.qc_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", ga.qc_vol$label[cols_edit])

ga.qc_vol_sig_MC <- ga.qc_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc_vol_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga.qc_vol
name <- "ga.qc_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga.qc_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(ga.qc_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga.qc_vol_noplot <- ga.qc_vol_sig_MC[!(ga.qc_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga.qc_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga.qc_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA, QC covar, Volume"))

(ga.qc_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "GA, QC covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc_dkt_vol_plot, "ga-qc-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(ga.qc_aseg_vol_plot , "ga-qc-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage.qc_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

gabyage.qc_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage.qc_vol$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc_vol$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage.qc_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(gabyage.qc_vol), perl = TRUE)

gabyage.qc_vol$label <- rownames(gabyage.qc_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

gabyage.qc_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", gabyage.qc_vol$label[cols_edit])

gabyage.qc_vol_sig_MC <- gabyage.qc_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(gabyage.qc_vol_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(gabyage.qc_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga.qc_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga.qc_sa_noplot <- ga.qc_sa_sig_MC[!(ga.qc_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga.qc_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga.qc_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA, QC covar, Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc_dkt_sa_plot, "ga-qc-dkt-sa", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage.qc_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

gabyage.qc_sa$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc_sa$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage.qc_sa$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc_sa$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage.qc_sa %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc_sa %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc_sa %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
gabyage.qc_sa$label <- rownames(gabyage.qc_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

gabyage.qc_sa_sig_MC <- gabyage.qc_sa %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(gabyage.qc_sa_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- gabyage.qc_sa
name <- "gabyage.qc_surfArea.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(gabyage.qc_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(gabyage.qc_sa_noplot <- gabyage.qc_sa_sig_MC[!(gabyage.qc_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(gabyage.qc_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(gabyage.qc_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GAxAge, QC covar, Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage.qc_dkt_sa_plot, "gabyage-qc-dkt-sa", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(gabyage.qc_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
vars <- rownames(gabyage.qc_sa_sig_MC[order(-(gabyage.qc_sa_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_Graysa_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("aseg_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("X", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = gestational_age, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("gabyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[5,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  ga.qc_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + euler_mean_mpr, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
} else{
  ga.qc_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + qc_var, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
}

ga.qc_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc_th_median$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc_th_median$ga_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(ga.qc_th_median %>% filter(ga_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc_th_median %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
ga.qc_th_median_sig_MC <- ga.qc_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(ga.qc_th_median))) %>%
filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

ga.qc_th_subset<- ga.qc_th[rownames(ga.qc_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(ga.qc_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

ga.qc_th_sig_all <- rbind(ga.qc_th_median_sig_MC, ga.qc_th_subset)

(ga.qc_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(ga.qc_th_sig_all, aes(x = ga_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ga_beta - ga_se, xmax = ga_beta + ga_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate GA, with QC") +
    ylab(""))

(ga_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(ga.qc_th_sig_all, aes(x = ga_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for GA, with QC") +
    ylab(""))

ga.qc_compare_plot <- ga.qc_beta_compare_plot + ga_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc_compare_plot, "ga.qc-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}

}
ga.qc_compare_plot
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.qc_th$label <- rownames(ga.qc_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

ga.qc_th_sig_MC <- ga.qc_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc_th_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

###### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga.qc_th_young_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga.qc_th_young_noplot <- ga.qc_th_young_sig_MC[!(ga.qc_th_young_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga.qc_th_young_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga.qcyoung_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA, Young, QC Covar, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qcyoung_dkt_th_plot, "ga-young-qc-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### old

###### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_old$gestational_age))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc_th_old <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_old[, which(names(df.zscore_old) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + qc_var, data = df.zscore_old)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc_th_old$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc_th_old$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc_th_old %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

###### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.qc_th_old$label <- rownames(ga.qc_th_old) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

ga.qc_th_old_sig_MC <- ga.qc_th_old %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc_th_old_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

###### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga.qc_th_old
name <- "ga.qc_thick_old.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

### Thickness (>= 1 year chronological age)
(adjusted age 280+365.25 days))

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  ga.qc.overOne_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + euler_mean_mpr, data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  
} else{
ga.qc.overOne_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + qc_var, data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
}
ga.qc.overOne_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.overOne_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.overOne_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc.overOne_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.overOne_th_median$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.overOne_th_median$ga_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(ga.qc.overOne_th_median %>% filter(ga_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.overOne_th_median %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
ga.qc.overOne_th_median_sig_MC <- ga.qc.overOne_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(ga.qc.overOne_th_median))) %>%
filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

ga.qc.overOne_th_subset<- ga.qc.overOne_th[rownames(ga.qc.overOne_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(ga.qc.overOne_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

ga.qc.overOne_th_sig_all <- rbind(ga.qc.overOne_th_median_sig_MC, ga.qc.overOne_th_subset)

(ga.qc.overOne_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(ga.qc.overOne_th_sig_all, aes(x = ga_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ga_beta - ga_se, xmax = ga_beta + ga_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate GA, with QC, >= 1 years,") +
    ylab(""))

(ga.qc.overOne_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(ga.qc.overOne_th_sig_all, aes(x = ga_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for GA, with QC") +
    ylab(""))

ga.qc.overOne_compare_plot <- ga.qc.overOne_beta_compare_plot + ga.qc.overOne_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc.overOne_compare_plot, "ga.qc.overOne-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}

}

ga.qc.overOne_compare_plot
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.qc.overOne_th$label <- rownames(ga.qc.overOne_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

ga.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC <- ga.qc.overOne_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage.qc.overOne_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

gabyage.qc.overOne_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.overOne_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage.qc.overOne_th$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.overOne_th$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage.qc.overOne_th %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.overOne_th %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.overOne_th %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}

   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(gabyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(gabyage.qc.overOne_th_noplot <- gabyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC[!(gabyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(gabyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

  geom_brain(atlas = dk,
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if(dim(gabyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0) {
vars <- rownames(gabyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC[order(-(gabyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore_overOne[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore_overOne))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", vars[i])
    if(median_th_mpr_flag){
    lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days + euler_mean_mpr, df.zscore_overOne)
  } else{
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, df.zscore_overOne)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = gestational_age, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("gabyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[5,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

### Thickness (no VPM)

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM$gestational_age) & is.na(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))

  ga.qc.noVPM_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + euler_mean_mpr, data = df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
  
} else{
ga.qc.noVPM_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + qc_var, data = df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
}

ga.qc.noVPM_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.noVPM_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.noVPM_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}

# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical

  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.noVPM_th_median$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.noVPM_th_median$ga_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(ga.qc.noVPM_th_median %>% filter(ga_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.noVPM_th_median %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
ga.qc.noVPM_th_median_sig_MC <- ga.qc.noVPM_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(ga.qc.noVPM_th_median))) %>%
  filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

ga.qc.noVPM_th_subset<- ga.qc.noVPM_th[rownames(ga.qc.noVPM_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(ga.qc.noVPM_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

ga.qc.noVPM_th_sig_all <- rbind(ga.qc.noVPM_th_median_sig_MC, ga.qc.noVPM_th_subset)

(ga.qc.noVPM_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(ga.qc.noVPM_th_sig_all, aes(x = ga_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ga_beta - ga_se, xmax = ga_beta + ga_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate GA, with QC, no VPM,") +
    ylab(""))

(ga.qc.noVPM_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(ga.qc.noVPM_th_sig_all, aes(x = ga_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for GA, with QC") +
    ylab(""))

ga.qc.noVPM_compare_plot <- ga.qc.noVPM_beta_compare_plot + ga.qc.noVPM_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc.noVPM_compare_plot, "ga.qc.noVPM-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}

}
ga.qc.noVPM_compare_plot
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.qc.noVPM_th$label <- rownames(ga.qc.noVPM_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

ga.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC <- ga.qc.noVPM_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga.qc.noVPM_th
name <- "ga.qc.noVPM_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga.qc.noVPM_th_noplot <- ga.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC[!(ga.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga.qc.noVPM_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA, QC covar, no VPM, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc.noVPM_dkt_th_plot, "ga-qc-noVPM-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage.qc.noVPM_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, data = df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

gabyage.qc.noVPM_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage.qc.noVPM_th$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], gabyge_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median$gabyge_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median$gabyge_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median %>% filter(gabyge_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median %>% filter(gabyge_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median_sig_MC <- gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median %>%
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median))) %>%
  filter(gabyge_p_adj < 0.05)
  
gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_subset<- gabyage.qc.noVPM_th[rownames(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",

(gabyage.qc.noVPM_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_sig_all, aes(x = gabyage_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = gabyage_beta - gabyage_se, xmax = gabyage_beta + gabyage_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate GA x Age, with QC, no VPM") +
    ylab(""))

(gabyage.qc.noVPM_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_sig_all, aes(x = gabyge_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for GA x Age, with QC") +
    ylab(""))

gabyage.qc.noVPM_compare_plot <- gabyage.qc.noVPM_beta_compare_plot + gabyage.qc.noVPM_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage.qc.noVPM_compare_plot, "gabyage.qc.noVPM-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_noplot <- gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC[!(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(gabyage.qc.noVPM_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if(dim(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0) {
vars <- rownames(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC[order(-(gabyage.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore_overOne_noVPM[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", vars[i])
  if(median_th_mpr_flag){
    lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days + euler_mean_mpr, df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  } else{
  lm <- lm(x ~ gestational_age*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = gestational_age, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("gabyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[5,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

## BW with QC covariate

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + qc_var, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc_vol$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc_vol$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bw.qc_vol), perl = TRUE)

bw.qc_vol$label <- rownames(bw.qc_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bw.qc_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bw.qc_vol$label[cols_edit])

bw.qc_vol_sig_MC <- bw.qc_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc_vol_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc_vol
name <- "bw.qc_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(bw.qc_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc_vol_noplot <- bw.qc_vol_sig_MC[!(bw.qc_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, QC Covar, Volume"))

(bw.qc_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BW, QC Covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc_dkt_vol_plot, "bw-qc-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(bw.qc_aseg_vol_plot , "bw-qc-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC covar, Volume"))

(bwbyage.qc_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BWAxAge, QC Covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage.qc_dkt_vol_plot, "ga-qcbyage-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(bwbyage.qc_aseg_vol_plot , "ga-qcbyage-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(bwbyage.qc_vol_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
vars <- rownames(bwbyage.qc_vol_sig_MC[order(-(bwbyage.qc_vol_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("aseg_", "", vars[i])
  y_label <- sub("X", "", vars[i])
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = birth_weight_kg, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("bwbyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[5,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

### Surface Area

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_SurfArea_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + qc_var, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc_sa$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc_sa$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc_sa$label <- rownames(bw.qc_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

bw.qc_sa_sig_MC <- bw.qc_sa %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc_sa_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc_sa
name <- "bw.qc_surfArea.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc_sa_noplot <- bw.qc_sa_sig_MC[!(bw.qc_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, QC covar, Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc_dkt_sa_plot, "bw-qc-dkt-sa", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage.qc_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

bwbyage.qc_sa$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc_sa$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage.qc_sa$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc_sa$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage.qc_sa %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage.qc_sa$label <- rownames(bwbyage.qc_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

bwbyage.qc_sa_sig_MC <- bwbyage.qc_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage.qc_sa_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}

  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas

output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (dim(bwbyage.qc_sa_sig_MC)[1] > 0){
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  bw.qc_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + euler_mean_mpr, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
} else{
bw.qc_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + qc_var, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
}

bw.qc_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc_th_median$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc_th_median$bw_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bw.qc_th_median %>% filter(bw_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc_th_median %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
bw.qc_th_median_sig_MC <- bw.qc_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(bw.qc_th_median))) %>%
  filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

bw.qc_th_subset<- bw.qc_th[rownames(bw.qc_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(bw.qc_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

bw.qc_th_sig_all <- rbind(bw.qc_th_median_sig_MC, bw.qc_th_subset)

(bw.qc_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(bw.qc_th_sig_all, aes(x = bw_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = bw_beta - bw_se, xmax = bw_beta + bw_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate BW, with QC") +
    ylab(""))

(bw.qc_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(bw.qc_th_sig_all, aes(x = bw_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for BW, with QC") +
    ylab(""))

bw.qc_compare_plot <- bw.qc_beta_compare_plot + bw.qc_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc_compare_plot, "bw.qc-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}

}

bw.qc_compare_plot
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc_th$label <- rownames(bw.qc_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw.qc_th_sig_MC <- bw.qc_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc_th_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}

if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
# plots

  geom_brain(atlas = dk,

  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bwbyage.qc_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage.qc_th_noplot <- bwbyage.qc_th_sig_MC[!(bwbyage.qc_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage.qc_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwbyage.qc_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC covar, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage.qc_dkt_th_plot, "bwbyage-qc-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if(dim(bwbyage.qc_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0) {
vars <- rownames(bwbyage.qc_th_sig_MC[order(-(bwbyage.qc_th_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", vars[i])
    if(median_th_mpr_flag){
    lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days + euler_mean_mpr, df.zscore)
  } else{
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, df.zscore)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = birth_weight_kg, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("bwbyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[5,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

####  group by age and check bw.qc on thickness effect

##### young

###### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_young$birth_weight_kg))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc_th_young <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_young[, which(names(df.zscore_young) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + qc_var, data = df.zscore_young)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc_th_young$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc_th_young$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc_th_young %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

###### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc_th_young$label <- rownames(bw.qc_th_young) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw.qc_th_young_sig_MC <- bw.qc_th_young %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc_th_young_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

###### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc_th_young
name <- "bw.qc_thick_young.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

### Thickness (>= 1 year chronological age)
(adjusted age 280+365.25 days))

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  bw.qc.overOne_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + euler_mean_mpr, data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
} else{
bw.qc.overOne_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + qc_var, data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
}

bw.qc.overOne_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.overOne_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.overOne_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.overOne_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.overOne_th_median$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.overOne_th_median$bw_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bw.qc.overOne_th_median %>% filter(bw_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.overOne_th_median %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
bw.qc.overOne_th_median_sig_MC <- bw.qc.overOne_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(bw.qc.overOne_th_median))) %>%
  filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

bw.qc.overOne_th_subset<- bw.qc.overOne_th[rownames(bw.qc.overOne_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(bw.qc.overOne_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

bw.qc.overOne_th_sig_all <- rbind(bw.qc.overOne_th_median_sig_MC, bw.qc.overOne_th_subset)

(bw.qc.overOne_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(bw.qc.overOne_th_sig_all, aes(x = bw_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = bw_beta - bw_se, xmax = bw_beta + bw_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate BW, with QC, >= 1 years,") +
    ylab(""))

(bw.qc.overOne_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(bw.qc.overOne_th_sig_all, aes(x = bw_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for BW, with QC") +
    ylab(""))

bw.qc.overOne_compare_plot <- bw.qc.overOne_beta_compare_plot + bw.qc.overOne_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.overOne_compare_plot, "bw.qc.overOne-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}

}

bw.qc.overOne_compare_plot
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc.overOne_th$label <- rownames(bw.qc.overOne_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC <- bw.qc.overOne_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L",

  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage.qc.overOne_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

bwbyage.qc.overOne_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage.qc.overOne_th$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```
