```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th_noplot <- bwbyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC[!(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwbyage.qc.overOne_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "bwxAge, QC covar, >= 1 years, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage.qc.overOne_dkt_th_plot, "bwbyage-qc-overOne-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction plots
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if(dim(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC)[1] > 0) {
vars <- rownames(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC[order(-(bwbyage.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)),])
interaction_plots <-  vector(mode = "list", length = length(vars))
if (length(vars) > 0) {
for (i in 1:length(vars)){
  x <- df.zscore_overOne[,grepl(pattern = paste0(vars[i],"$"), names(df.zscore_overOne))]
  y_label <- sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", vars[i])
  if(median_th_mpr_flag){
    lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days + euler_mean_mpr, df.zscore_overOne)
  } else{
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, df.zscore_overOne)
  }
  summary <- summary(lm)
  interaction_plots[[i]] <- interact_plot(lm, pred = birth_weight_kg, modx = adjusted_age_in_days) + ylab(y_label) + ggtitle(paste0("bwbyage beta = ", as.character(signif(summary$coefficients[5,1], 3))))
}
interaction_plots
}
}
```

### Thickness (no VPM)

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
if(median_th_mpr_flag == TRUE){
  bw.qc.noVPM_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + euler_mean_mpr, data = df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
} else{
bw.qc.noVPM_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + qc_var, data = df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
}

bw.qc.noVPM_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.noVPM_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.noVPM_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### median vs mpr compare
###### compute regressions with median thickness
```{r, echo = FALSE}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.noVPM_th_median <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM) %in% th_vars_median)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg + median_euler_mean, data = df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.noVPM_th_median$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.noVPM_th_median$bw_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bw.qc.noVPM_th_median %>% filter(bw_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.noVPM_th_median %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
}
```

###### comparison plot
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%"}
if (median_th_mpr_flag){
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts.median))
bw.qc.noVPM_th_median_sig_MC <- bw.qc.noVPM_th_median %>% 
    mutate(type = "median",
         pheno = sub(".median", "", rownames(bw.qc.noVPM_th_median))) %>%
  filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

bw.qc.noVPM_th_subset<- bw.qc.noVPM_th[rownames(bw.qc.noVPM_th) %in% sub(".median", "", rownames(bw.qc.noVPM_th_median_sig_MC)),] %>%
  mutate(type = "mpr",
         pheno = rownames(.))

bw.qc.noVPM_th_sig_all <- rbind(bw.qc.noVPM_th_median_sig_MC, bw.qc.noVPM_th_subset)

(bw.qc.noVPM_beta_compare_plot <- ggplot(bw.qc.noVPM_th_sig_all, aes(x = bw_beta, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = bw_beta - bw_se, xmax = bw_beta + bw_se, color = type), height = 0.2) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 0.03)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Standardized Beta Estimate bw, with QC, no VPM,") +
    ylab(""))

(bw.qc.noVPM_p_compare_plot <- ggplot(bw.qc.noVPM_th_sig_all, aes(x = bw_p_adj, y = pheno)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = type), size = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgray") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.line.x  = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c("left", "top")
    ) +
    xlab("Adjusted (BH) P-value for bw, with QC") +
    ylab(""))

bw.qc.noVPM_compare_plot <- bw.qc.noVPM_beta_compare_plot + bw.qc.noVPM_p_compare_plot + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.noVPM_compare_plot, "bw.qc.noVPM-th-compare-plot", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 18, plot_height = 10)
}

}

bw.qc.noVPM_compare_plot
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC <- bw.qc.noVPM_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.noVPM_th_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas

write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage.qc.noVPM_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne_noVPM) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(x ~ birth_weight_kg*adjusted_age_in_days + qc_var, data = df.zscore_overOne_noVPM)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[5,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[5,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[5,2])
})))

bwbyage.qc.noVPM_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.noVPM_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage.qc.noVPM_th$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.noVPM_th$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage.qc.noVPM_th %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.noVPM_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.noVPM_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

# Analyses with regional phenotypes (euler score QC and global measure centile covariate, thickness >= 1 years)
## GA with qc and a global measure covariate

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(glue("Global measure for volume is {global_measure_vol}"))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc.global_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "qc_var", global_measure_vol), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.global_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.global_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.global_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(ga.qc.global_vol), perl = TRUE)

ga.qc.global_vol$label <- rownames(ga.qc.global_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

ga.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", ga.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit])

ga.qc.global_vol_sig_MC <- ga.qc.global_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga.qc.global_vol
name <- "ga.qc.global_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(ga.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga.qc.global_vol_noplot <- ga.qc.global_vol_sig_MC[!(ga.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA, QC and global covar, Volume"))

(ga.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "GA, QC and global covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot, "ga-qc-global-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(ga.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot , "ga-qc-global-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage.qc.global_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "adjusted_age_in_days", "qc_var", global_measure_vol, "gestational_age:adjusted_age_in_days"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[6,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[6,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[6,2])
})))

gabyage.qc.global_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.global_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage.qc.global_vol$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.global_vol$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(gabyage.qc.global_vol), perl = TRUE)

gabyage.qc.global_vol$label <- rownames(gabyage.qc.global_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

gabyage.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", gabyage.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit])

gabyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC <- gabyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(gabyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- gabyage.qc.global_vol
name <- "gabyage.qc.global_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(gabyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(gabyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(gabyage.qc.global_vol_noplot <- gabyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC[!(gabyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(gabyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(gabyage.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GAxAge, QC and global covar, Volume"))

(gabyage.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "GAxAge, QC and global covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot, "gabyage-qc-global-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(gabyage.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot , "gabyage-qc-global-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

### Surface Area

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(glue("Global measure for surface area is {global_measure_sa}"))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_SurfArea_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc.global_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% sa_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "qc_var", global_measure_sa), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.global_sa$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.global_sa$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.global_sa %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.qc.global_sa$label <- rownames(ga.qc.global_sa) %>% 
  sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", .)

ga.qc.global_sa_sig_MC <- ga.qc.global_sa %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc.global_sa_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga.qc.global_sa
name <- "ga.qc.global_surfArea.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(glue("Global measure for cortical thickness is {global_measure_th}"))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc.global_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "qc_var", global_measure_th), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.global_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.global_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.global_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}

  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc.global_th_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas

output_folder <- betas_folder

}
```

##### old

###### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_old$gestational_age))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc.global_th_old <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_old[, which(names(df.zscore_old) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age","qc_var", global_measure_th), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_old)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.global_th_old$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.global_th_old$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.global_th_old %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

###### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.qc.global_th_old$label <- rownames(ga.qc.global_th_old) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

ga.qc.global_th_old_sig_MC <- ga.qc.global_th_old %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc.global_th_old_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

###### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga.qc.global_th_old
name <- "ga.qc.global_thick_old.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

###### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga.qc.global_th_old_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga.qc.global_th_old_noplot <- ga.qc.global_th_old_sig_MC[!(ga.qc.global_th_old_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga.qc.global_th_old_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga.qc.globalold_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA, Old, QC and global covar, Cortical Thickness"))
if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc.globalold_dkt_th_plot, "ga-qc-meanth-old-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

## BW with qc and a global measure covariate

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(glue("Global measure for volume is {global_measure_vol}"))
sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.global_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "qc_var", global_measure_vol), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.global_vol$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.global_vol$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bw.qc.global_vol), perl = TRUE)

bw.qc.global_vol$label <- rownames(bw.qc.global_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bw.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bw.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit])

bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC <- bw.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc.global_vol
name <- "bw.qc.global_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc.global_vol_noplot <- bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC[!(bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, QC and global covar, Volume"))

(bw.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BW, QC and global covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot, "bw-qc-global-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(bw.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot , "bw-qc-global-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage.qc.global_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "adjusted_age_in_days", "qc_var", global_measure_vol, "birth_weight_kg:adjusted_age_in_days"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[6,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[6,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[6,2])
})))

bwbyage.qc.global_vol$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.global_vol$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage.qc.global_vol$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.global_vol$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bwbyage.qc.global_vol), perl = TRUE)

bwbyage.qc.global_vol$label <- rownames(bwbyage.qc.global_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bwbyage.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bwbyage.qc.global_vol$label[cols_edit])

bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC <- bwbyage.qc.global_vol %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwbyage.qc.global_vol
name <- "bwbyage.qc.global_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage.qc.global_vol_noplot <- bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC[!(bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage.qc.global_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwbyage.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC and global covar, Volume"))

(bwbyage.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC and global covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage.qc.global_dkt_vol_plot, "bwbyage-qc-global-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(bwbyage.qc.global_aseg_vol_plot , "bwbyage-qc-global-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

### Thickness

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage.qc.global_th_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwbyage.qc.global_th
name <- "bwbyage.qc.global_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bwbyage.qc.global_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage.qc.global_th_noplot <- bwbyage.qc.global_th_sig_MC[!(bwbyage.qc.global_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage.qc.global_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwbyage.qc.global_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC and global covar, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage.qc.global_dkt_th_plot, "bwbyage-qc-global-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

####  group by age and check bw.qc.global on thickness effect

##### young

###### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
sum(!is.na(df.zscore_young_overOne$birth_weight_kg))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.global_th_young <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_young_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_young_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "qc_var", global_measure_th), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_young_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.global_th_young$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.global_th_young$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.global_th_young %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

###### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}

  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw.qc.global_th_young_sig_MC <- bw.qc.global_th_young %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.global_th_young_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

# Analyses with regional phenotypes (euler score QC and weight/height at encounter covariate, thickness >= 1 year at scan)
Using weight/height sds (in units of standard deviation) calculated using the childsds package, using WHO growth charts, with sex and adjusted age in years as input.
## GA with qc and weight/height (at time of scan) covariate

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent))
print(glue("Total N with Vol, GA and weight/height at enc {N}"))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc.wh_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.wh_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.wh_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(ga.qc.wh_vol), perl = TRUE)

ga.qc.wh_vol$label <- rownames(ga.qc.wh_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

ga.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", ga.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit])

ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC <- ga.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga.qc.wh_vol
name <- "ga.qc.wh_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga.qc.wh_vol_noplot <- ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC[!(ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga.qc.wh_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

(ga.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "GA, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc.wh_dkt_vol_plot, "ga-qc-wh-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(ga.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot , "ga-qc-wh-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage.qc.wh_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "adjusted_age_in_days", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent", "gestational_age:adjusted_age_in_days"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[7,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[7,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[7,2])
})))

gabyage.qc.wh_vol$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.wh_vol$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage.qc.wh_vol$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.wh_vol$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(gabyage.qc.wh_vol), perl = TRUE)

gabyage.qc.wh_vol$label <- rownames(gabyage.qc.wh_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

gabyage.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", gabyage.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit])

gabyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC <- gabyage.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(gabyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- gabyage.qc.wh_vol
name <- "gabyage.qc.wh_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(gabyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(gabyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(gabyage.qc.wh_vol_noplot <- gabyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC[!(gabyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(gabyage.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(gabyage.qc.wh_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GAxAge, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

(gabyage.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "GAxAge, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage.qc.wh_dkt_vol_plot, "gabyage-qc-wh-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(gabyage.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot , "gabyage-qc-wh-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(gabyage.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(gabyage.qc_sa_noplot <- gabyage.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC[!(gabyage.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(gabyage.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(gabyage.qc_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GAxAge, QC and W/H covar, Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage.qc_dkt_sa_plot, "gabyage-qc-wh-dkt-sa", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$gestational_age) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent))
print(glue("Total N with Th, GA and weight/height at enc {N}"))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
ga.qc.wh_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

ga.qc.wh_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(ga.qc.wh_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(ga.qc.wh_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga.qc.wh_th$label <- rownames(ga.qc.wh_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

ga.qc.wh_th_sig_MC <- ga.qc.wh_th %>% filter(ga_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(ga.qc.wh_th_sig_MC$ga_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- ga.qc.wh_th
name <- "ga.qc.wh_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(ga.qc.wh_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(ga.qc.wh_th_noplot <- ga.qc.wh_th_sig_MC[!(ga.qc.wh_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(ga.qc.wh_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(ga.qc.wh_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = ga_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GA, QC and W/H covar, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(ga.qc.wh_dkt_th_plot, "ga-qc-wh-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
gabyage.qc.wh_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("gestational_age", "adjusted_age_in_days", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent", "gestational_age:adjusted_age_in_days"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(ga_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], ga_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], ga_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   gabyage_beta = summary$coefficients[7,1], gabyage_p = summary$coefficients[7,4], gabyage_se = summary$coefficients[7,2])
})))

gabyage.qc.wh_th$ga_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.wh_th$ga_p, method = "BH")
gabyage.qc.wh_th$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage.qc.wh_th$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(gabyage.qc.wh_th %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.wh_th %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage.qc.wh_th %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
gabyage.qc.wh_th$label <- rownames(gabyage.qc.wh_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)
  
gabyage.qc.wh_th_sig_MC <- gabyage.qc.wh_th %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(gabyage.qc.wh_th_sig_MC$gabyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- gabyage.qc.wh_th
name <- "gabyage.qc.wh_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(gabyage.qc.wh_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(gabyage.qc.wh_th_noplot <- gabyage.qc.wh_th_sig_MC[!(gabyage.qc.wh_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(gabyage.qc.wh_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(gabyage.qc.wh_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = gabyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "GAxAge, QC and W/H covar, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(gabyage.qc.wh_dkt_th_plot, "gabyage-qc-wh-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

## BW with qc and weight/height (at time of scan)  covariate

### Volume

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_GrayVol_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent))
print(glue("Total N with Vol, BW and weight/height at enc {N}"))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.wh_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore[, which(names(df.zscore) %in% vol_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.wh_vol$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.wh_vol$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
cols_edit <- grepl("aseg(?!_CC)", rownames(bw.qc.wh_vol), perl = TRUE)

bw.qc.wh_vol$label <- rownames(bw.qc.wh_vol) %>% 
  sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", .) %>% 
  sub("aseg_", "", .) %>%
  sub("X", "x", .) %>%
  sub("rd_Ventricle", "rd_ventricle", .) %>%     sub("th_Ventricle", "th_ventricle", .) %>% sub("Thalamus", "Thalamus-Proper", .)

bw.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit] <- gsub("_", "-", bw.qc.wh_vol$label[cols_edit])

bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC <- bw.qc.wh_vol %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc.wh_vol
name <- "bw.qc.wh_volume.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")
plot_data_aseg <- merge(bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC, ggseg::aseg, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc.wh_vol_noplot <- bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC[!(bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc.wh_vol_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc.wh_dkt_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

(bw.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_aseg) +
  geom_brain(atlas = aseg,
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "BW, QC and W/H covar, Volume"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.wh_dkt_vol_plot, "bw-qc-wh-dkt-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
panel_save(bw.qc.wh_aseg_vol_plot , "bw-qc-wh-aseg-vol", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore$aparc_SurfArea_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore$height_at_enc_cent))
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bwbyage.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bwbyage.qc_sa_noplot <- bwbyage.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC[!(bwbyage.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bwbyage.qc.wh_sa_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bwbyage.qc.wh_dkt_sa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bwbyage_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BWxAge, QC and W/H covar, Surface Area"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bwbyage.qc.wh_dkt_sa_plot, "bwbyage-qc-wh-dkt-sa", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

### Thickness

####  simple linear regressions

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
N <- sum(!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$aparc_ThickAvg_lh_bankssts) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$weight_at_enc_cent) & !is.na(df.zscore_overOne$height_at_enc_cent))
print(glue("Total N with Th, BW and weight/height at enc {N}"))
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bw.qc.wh_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2])
})))

bw.qc.wh_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bw.qc.wh_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs after FDR correction: ", dim(bw.qc.wh_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bw.qc.wh_th$label <- rownames(bw.qc.wh_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)

bw.qc.wh_th_sig_MC <- bw.qc.wh_th %>% filter(bw_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bw.qc.wh_th_sig_MC$bw_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bw.qc.wh_th
name <- "bw.qc.wh_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualization of betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# merge with atlas data
plot_data_dkt <- merge(bw.qc.wh_th_sig_MC, ggseg::dk, by = "label")

# Regions not matched in atlases
(bw.qc.wh_th_noplot <- bw.qc.wh_th_sig_MC[!(bw.qc.wh_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_dkt$label) & !(bw.qc.wh_th_sig_MC$label %in% plot_data_aseg$label),])

# plots
(bw.qc.wh_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),
             aes(fill = bw_beta)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
  theme_void()+
  labs(title = "BW, QC and W/H covar, Cortical Thickness"))

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(bw.qc.wh_dkt_th_plot, "bw-qc-wh-dkt-th", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```

####  lm with age interaction

##### compute regressions
```{r, echo = FALSE}
# Regional -- including cortical and subcortical
bwbyage.qc.wh_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(df.zscore_overOne[, which(names(df.zscore_overOne) %in% th_vars)], function(x) {
  lm <- lm(reformulate(c("birth_weight_kg", "adjusted_age_in_days", "qc_var", "weight_at_enc_cent", "height_at_enc_cent", "birth_weight_kg:adjusted_age_in_days"), response = "x"), data = df.zscore_overOne)
  summary <- summary(lm)
  c(bw_beta = summary$coefficients[2,1], bw_p = summary$coefficients[2,4], bw_se = summary$coefficients[2,2],
   age_beta = summary$coefficients[3,1], age_p = summary$coefficients[3,4], age_se = summary$coefficients[3,2],
   bwbyage_beta = summary$coefficients[7,1], bwbyage_p = summary$coefficients[7,4], bwbyage_se = summary$coefficients[7,2])
})))

bwbyage.qc.wh_th$bw_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.wh_th$bw_p, method = "BH")
bwbyage.qc.wh_th$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage.qc.wh_th$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Age Main significant results (shouldn't be any): ", dim(bwbyage.qc.wh_th %>% filter(age_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.wh_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs - AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage.qc.wh_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
```

##### add label column to match to ggseg
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage.qc.wh_th$label <- rownames(bwbyage.qc.wh_th) %>% 
  sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", .)
  
bwbyage.qc.wh_th_sig_MC <- bwbyage.qc.wh_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)

print(paste0("Beta range of significant IDPs: ", range(bwbyage.qc.wh_th_sig_MC$bwbyage_beta)))
```

##### save betas
```{r, echo = FALSE}
save_table_full <- bwbyage.qc.wh_th
name <- "bwbyage.qc.wh_thick.csv"
# Save dkt cortical betas for spin test
if(save_tables == TRUE){
  output_folder <-dkt_folder
  save_table_full$hemisphere <- ifelse(grepl("lh", save_table_full$label), "L", 
                         ifelse(grepl("rh", save_table_full$label), "R", NA))
  save_table_full$label <- sub("^rh_|lh_", "", save_table_full$label)
  filename_all <- paste0(output_folder, name)
  write.csv(save_table_full, filename_all)
}
# Save full betas
if(save_tables == TRUE){
output_folder <- betas_folder
filename <- paste0(output_folder, name)
write.csv(save_table_full, filename)
}
```

##### visualize interaction betas on surface maps
```{r, echo = FALSE}

# Regions not matched in atlases

# plots
(bwbyage.qc.wh_dkt_th_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_dkt) +
  geom_brain(atlas = dk, 
             position = position_brain(hemi ~ side),

  scale_fill_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, limits = limits) +
```

# Analyses with regional phenotypes, test linear vs spline fit (code not yet written)

## Volume

### GA
```{r, echo = FALSE}
ga_sp_models_vol <- lapply(vol_vars, function(x) {
  form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(gestational_age) + s(adjusted_age_in_days) + ti(gestational_age, adjusted_age_in_days) + qc_var"))
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore)
  return(gam_model)
  })

gabyage_sp_models_vol <- setNames(gabyage_sp_models_vol, vol_vars)

gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(gabyage_sp_models_vol,function(x) {
  summary <- summary(x$gam)
  c(ga_edf = summary$s.table[1,1], ga_p = summary$s.table[1,4],
    age_edf = summary$s.table[2,1], age_p = summary$s.table[2,4],
    gabyage_edf = summary$s.table[3,1], gabyage_p = summary$s.table[3,4])
  })))

rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol) <- vol_vars

gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)) ))

gabyage_sp_vol_sig_pheno <- rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))
```

# Analyses with regional phenotypes (non-linear models, with interaction term test)

## Volume

### GA

#### fit models
```{r, echo = FALSE}
gabyage_sp_models_vol <- lapply(vol_vars, function(x) {
  form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(gestational_age) + s(adjusted_age_in_days) + ti(gestational_age, adjusted_age_in_days) + qc_var"))
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore)
  return(gam_model)
  })

gabyage_sp_models_vol <- setNames(gabyage_sp_models_vol, vol_vars)

gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(gabyage_sp_models_vol,function(x) {
  summary <- summary(x$gam)
  c(ga_edf = summary$s.table[1,1], ga_p = summary$s.table[1,4],
    age_edf = summary$s.table[2,1], age_p = summary$s.table[2,4],
    gabyage_edf = summary$s.table[3,1], gabyage_p = summary$s.table[3,4])
  })))

rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol) <- vol_vars

gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)) ))

gabyage_sp_vol_sig_pheno <- rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))
```

#### Visualize models
```{r}
gabyage_sp_vol_plot_pheno <- rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_vol %>% filter(ga_edf > 2))
font_size <- 16
theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "sans",base_size = font_size))
line_size <- 1.5
point_size <- 2

mu_age <- mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_age <- sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days, na.rm = TRUE)

mu_ga <- mean(full_df$gestational_age, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_ga <- sd(full_df$gestational_age, na.rm = TRUE)

gabyage_sp_plots_vol <- lapply(gabyage_sp_models_vol[gabyage_sp_vol_plot_pheno], function(x) {
  
  
  low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.10)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25

  high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                      "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                            probs = c(.90)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  model_plot <- visualize_model(
  modobj = x,
  smooth_var = "gestational_age",
  int_var = "adjusted_age_in_days",
  plabels = "continuous interaction",
  derivative_plot = F)

  plot_colors <- ggplot_build(model_plot)$plot$scales$get_scales("fill")$palette(1)
  
  model_plot <- model_plot + 
    labs(x="Gestational Age (wks)",
         title = glue("{x$gam$terms[[2]]}"),
                  fill = "Age") +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) round(x * sd_ga + mu_ga, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c(paste0("Low: ",
                                      round(low_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("Mid: ",
                                      round(mid_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("High: ",
                                      round(high_age_label,1),"yrs")), 
                    values = plot_colors) +
   scale_color_gradientn(colors = plot_colors,
    labels = function(x) round((x * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25, 1),
    name = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) signif(pnorm(y)*100, 3))
  
  return(model_plot)
})

gabyage_sp_plots_vol <- setNames(gabyage_sp_plots_vol, gabyage_sp_vol_plot_pheno)

gabyage_sp_plots_vol_nopt <- lapply(gabyage_sp_plots_vol, function(x){
x$layers[1] <- NULL
x})

# wrap_plots(gabyage_sp_plots_vol_nopt, ncol = 2, guides = "collect") &
#   theme(legend.position = "right")
# 
# wrap_plots(gabyage_sp_plots_vol, ncol = 2, guides = "collect") &
#   theme(legend.position = "right")

wrapped_plot_n <- 4 

plot_batches <- split(gabyage_sp_plots_vol, ceiling(seq_along(gabyage_sp_plots_vol) / wrapped_plot_n))

 wrapped_list <- lapply(plot_batches, function(batch) {
   wrap_plots(batch, ncol = 2)
 })

wrapped_list

plot_batches_nopt <- split(gabyage_sp_plots_vol_nopt, ceiling(seq_along(gabyage_sp_plots_vol_nopt) / wrapped_plot_n))

 wrapped_list_nopt <- lapply(plot_batches_nopt, function(batch) {
   wrap_plots(batch, ncol = 2)
 })

wrapped_list_nopt
```

### BW

#### fit models
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage_sp_models_vol <- lapply(vol_vars, function(x) {
  form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(birth_weight_kg) + s(adjusted_age_in_days) + ti(birth_weight_kg, adjusted_age_in_days) + qc_var"))
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore)
  return(gam_model)
  })

bwbyage_sp_gam_table_vol <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(bwbyage_sp_models_vol,function(x) {

  c(bw_edf = summary$s.table[1,1], bw_p = summary$s.table[1,4],
```

```{r}
bwbyage_sp_vol_plot_pheno <- rownames(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_vol %>% filter(bw_edf > 2))
font_size <- 16

  low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.10)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25

    labels = function(x) round((x * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25, 1),
    name = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) signif(pnorm(y)*100, 3))
  
  return(model_plot)
})
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
```

#### Visualize models
```{r}
gabyage_sp_sa_plot_pheno <- rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_sa %>% filter(ga_edf > 2))
font_size <- 16
theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "sans",base_size = font_size))
line_size <- 1.5
point_size <- 2

mu_age <- mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_age <- sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days, na.rm = TRUE)

mu_ga <- mean(full_df$gestational_age, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_ga <- sd(full_df$gestational_age, na.rm = TRUE)

gabyage_sp_plots_sa <- lapply(gabyage_sp_models_sa[gabyage_sp_sa_plot_pheno], function(x) {
  
  
  low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.10)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25

  high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$gestational_age),
                                      "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                            probs = c(.90)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  model_plot <- visualize_model(
  modobj = x,
  smooth_var = "gestational_age",
  int_var = "adjusted_age_in_days",
  plabels = "continuous interaction",
  derivative_plot = F)

  plot_colors <- ggplot_build(model_plot)$plot$scales$get_scales("fill")$palette(1)
  
  model_plot <- model_plot + 
    labs(x="Gestational Age (wks)",
         title = glue("{x$gam$terms[[2]]}"),
                  fill = "Age") +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) round(x * sd_ga + mu_ga, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c(paste0("Low: ",
                                      round(low_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("Mid: ",
                                      round(mid_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("High: ",
                                      round(high_age_label,1),"yrs")), 
                    values = plot_colors) +
   scale_color_gradientn(colors = plot_colors,
    labels = function(x) round((x * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25, 1),
    name = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) signif(pnorm(y)*100, 3))
  
  return(model_plot)
})

gabyage_sp_plots_sa <- setNames(gabyage_sp_plots_sa, gabyage_sp_sa_plot_pheno)

gabyage_sp_plots_sa_nopt <- lapply(gabyage_sp_plots_sa, function(x){
x$layers[1] <- NULL
x})

wrapped_plot_n <- 4 

plot_batches <- split(gabyage_sp_plots_sa, ceiling(seq_along(gabyage_sp_plots_sa) / wrapped_plot_n))

 wrapped_list <- lapply(plot_batches, function(batch) {
   wrap_plots(batch, ncol = 2)
 })

wrapped_list

plot_batches_nopt <- split(gabyage_sp_plots_sa_nopt, ceiling(seq_along(gabyage_sp_plots_sa_nopt) / wrapped_plot_n))

 wrapped_list_nopt <- lapply(plot_batches_nopt, function(batch) {
   wrap_plots(batch, ncol = 2)
 })

wrapped_list_nopt

#wrapped_list
```

### BW

#### fit models
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage_sp_models_sa <- lapply(sa_vars, function(x) {
  form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(birth_weight_kg) + s(adjusted_age_in_days) + ti(birth_weight_kg, adjusted_age_in_days) + qc_var"))
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore)
  return(gam_model)
  })

bwbyage_sp_models_sa <- setNames(bwbyage_sp_models_sa, sa_vars)

bwbyage_sp_gam_table_sa <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(bwbyage_sp_models_sa,function(x) {
  summary <- summary(x$gam)
  c(bw_edf = summary$s.table[1,1], bw_p = summary$s.table[1,4],
    age_edf = summary$s.table[2,1], age_p = summary$s.table[2,4],
    bwbyage_edf = summary$s.table[3,1], bwbyage_p = summary$s.table[3,4])
  })))

rownames(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_sa) <- sa_vars

bwbyage_sp_gam_table_sa$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_sa$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for bw x Age- NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for bw x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Significant IDPs for bw x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", rownames(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)) ))

bwbyage_sp_sa_sig_pheno <- rownames(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_sa %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))
```

#### Visualize models
```{r}
bwbyage_sp_sa_plot_pheno <- rownames(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_sa %>% filter(bw_edf > 2))
font_size <- 16
theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "sans",base_size = font_size))
line_size <- 1.5
point_size <- 2
source("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/visualize_model_bartfct.R")

mu_age <- mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_age <- sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days, na.rm = TRUE)

mu_bw <- mean(full_df$birth_weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_bw <- sd(full_df$birth_weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE)

bwbyage_sp_plots_sa <- lapply(bwbyage_sp_models_sa[bwbyage_sp_sa_plot_pheno], function(x) {
  
  
  low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.10)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25

  high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore[!is.na(df.zscore$birth_weight_kg),
                                      "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                            probs = c(.90)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  model_plot <- visualize_model(
  modobj = x,
  smooth_var = "birth_weight_kg",
  int_var = "adjusted_age_in_days",
  plabels = "continuous interaction",
  derivative_plot = F)

  plot_colors <- ggplot_build(model_plot)$plot$scales$get_scales("fill")$palette(1)
  
  model_plot <- model_plot + 
    labs(x="Birth Weight (kg)",
         title = glue("{x$gam$terms[[2]]}"),
                  fill = "Age") +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) round(x * sd_bw + mu_bw, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c(paste0("Low: ",
                                      round(low_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("Mid: ",
                                      round(mid_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("High: ",
                                      round(high_age_label,1),"yrs")), 
                    values = plot_colors) +
   scale_color_gradientn(colors = plot_colors,
    labels = function(x) round((x * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25, 1),
    name = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) signif(pnorm(y)*100, 3))
  
  return(model_plot)
})

bwbyage_sp_plots_sa <- setNames(bwbyage_sp_plots_sa, bwbyage_sp_sa_plot_pheno)

bwbyage_sp_plots_sa_nopt <- lapply(bwbyage_sp_plots_sa, function(x){
x$layers[1] <- NULL
x})

wrapped_plot_n <- 4 

plot_batches <- split(bwbyage_sp_plots_sa, ceiling(seq_along(bwbyage_sp_plots_sa) / wrapped_plot_n))
```

## Thickness (mpr, df.zscore_overOne overOne sample)
### GA

#### fit models
```{r, echo = FALSE}
gabyage_sp_models_th <- lapply(th_vars, function(x) {
  form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(gestational_age) + s(adjusted_age_in_days) + ti(gestational_age, adjusted_age_in_days) + euler_mean_mpr"))
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore_overOne)
  return(gam_model)
  })

gabyage_sp_models_th <- setNames(gabyage_sp_models_th, th_vars)

gabyage_sp_gam_table_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(gabyage_sp_models_th,function(x) {
  summary <- summary(x$gam)
  c(ga_edf = summary$s.table[1,1], ga_p = summary$s.table[1,4],
    age_edf = summary$s.table[2,1], age_p = summary$s.table[2,4],
    gabyage_edf = summary$s.table[3,1], gabyage_p = summary$s.table[3,4])
  })))

rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_th) <- th_vars

gabyage_sp_gam_table_th$gabyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(gabyage_sp_gam_table_th$gabyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- NO correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_th %>% filter(gabyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(gabyage_sp_gam_table_th %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Significant IDPs for GA x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_th %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05)) ))

gabyage_sp_th_sig_pheno <- rownames(gabyage_sp_gam_table_th %>% filter(gabyage_p_adj < 0.05))
```
