```{r}
wrapped_list

plot_batches_nopt <- split(gabyage_sp_plots_th_nopt, ceiling(seq_along(gabyage_sp_plots_th_nopt) / wrapped_plot_n))

 wrapped_list_nopt <- lapply(plot_batches_nopt, function(batch) {
   wrap_plots(batch, ncol = 2)
 })

wrapped_list_nopt
```

### BW

#### fit models
```{r, echo = FALSE}
bwbyage_sp_models_th <- lapply(th_vars, function(x) {
  form <- as.formula(glue("{x} ~ s(birth_weight_kg) + s(adjusted_age_in_days) + ti(birth_weight_kg, adjusted_age_in_days) + euler_mean_mpr"))
  gam_model <- gamm(as.formula(form),
              data = df.zscore_overOne)
  return(gam_model)
  })

bwbyage_sp_models_th <- setNames(bwbyage_sp_models_th, th_vars)

bwbyage_sp_gam_table_th <- as.data.frame(t(sapply(bwbyage_sp_models_th,function(x) {
  summary <- summary(x$gam)
  c(bw_edf = summary$s.table[1,1], bw_p = summary$s.table[1,4],
    age_edf = summary$s.table[2,1], age_p = summary$s.table[2,4],
    bwbyage_edf = summary$s.table[3,1], bwbyage_p = summary$s.table[3,4])
  })))

rownames(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_th) <- th_vars

bwbyage_sp_gam_table_th$bwbyage_p_adj <- p.adjust(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_th$bwbyage_p, method = "BH")

print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for bw x Age- NO correction: ", dim(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Number of significant IDPs for bw x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", dim(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))[1]))
print(paste0("Significant IDPs for bw x Age- AFTER FDR correction: ", rownames(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05)) ))

bwbyage_sp_th_sig_pheno <- rownames(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_th %>% filter(bwbyage_p_adj < 0.05))
```

#### Visualize models
```{r}
bwbyage_sp_th_plot_pheno <- rownames(bwbyage_sp_gam_table_th %>% filter(bw_edf > 2))
font_size <- 16
theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "sans",base_size = font_size))
line_size <- 1.5
point_size <- 2
source("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Eren/slip_premie_wip/visualize_model_bartfct.R")

mu_age <- mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_age <- sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days, na.rm = TRUE)

mu_bw <- mean(full_df$birth_weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_bw <- sd(full_df$birth_weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE)

bwbyage_sp_plots_th <- lapply(bwbyage_sp_models_th[bwbyage_sp_th_sig_pheno], function(x) {
  
  
  low_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore_overOne[!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.10)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  mid_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore_overOne[!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg),
                                       "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                             probs = c(.50)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25

  high_age_label <- (quantile(df.zscore_overOne[!is.na(df.zscore_overOne$birth_weight_kg),
                                      "adjusted_age_in_days"],
                            probs = c(.90)) * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25
  
  model_plot <- visualize_model(
  modobj = x,
  smooth_var = "birth_weight_kg",
  int_var = "adjusted_age_in_days",
  plabels = "continuous interaction",
  derivative_plot = F)

  plot_colors <- ggplot_build(model_plot)$plot$scales$get_scales("fill")$palette(1)
  
  model_plot <- model_plot + 
    labs(x="Birth Weight (kg)",
         title = glue("{x$gam$terms[[2]]}"),
                  fill = "Age") +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) round(x * sd_bw + mu_bw, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(labels = c(paste0("Low: ",
                                      round(low_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("Mid: ",
                                      round(mid_age_label,1),"yrs"),
                               paste0("High: ",
                                      round(high_age_label,1),"yrs")), 
                    values = plot_colors) +
   scale_color_gradientn(colors = plot_colors,
    labels = function(x) round((x * sd_age + mu_age)/365.25, 1),
    name = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) signif(pnorm(y)*100, 3))
  
  return(model_plot)
})

bwbyage_sp_plots_th <- setNames(bwbyage_sp_plots_th, bwbyage_sp_th_sig_pheno)

bwbyage_sp_plots_th_nopt <- lapply(bwbyage_sp_plots_th, function(x){
x$layers[1] <- NULL
x})

wrapped_plot_n <- 4 

plot_batches <- split(bwbyage_sp_plots_th, ceiling(seq_along(bwbyage_sp_plots_th) / wrapped_plot_n))

 wrapped_list <- lapply(plot_batches, function(batch) {
   wrap_plots(batch, ncol = 2)
 })

wrapped_list

plot_batches_nopt <- split(bwbyage_sp_plots_th_nopt, ceiling(seq_along(bwbyage_sp_plots_th_nopt) / wrapped_plot_n))

 wrapped_list_nopt <- lapply(plot_batches_nopt, function(batch) {
   wrap_plots(batch, ncol = 2)
 })

wrapped_list_nopt
```

# Save scale images

## beta scale
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#  Create dummy data just to generate the colorbar
df <- data.frame(x = 1, y = 1, beta = 0)

beta_scale_hor <- ggplot(df, aes(x, y, fill = beta)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = low_color,
    mid = mid_color,
    high = high_color,
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = limits,
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      barwidth = 20,   #  length of colorbar
      barheight = 1    #  thickness
    )
  ) +
  theme_void() +  #  remove axes, grid, etc.
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )

beta_scale_vert <- ggplot(df, aes(x, y, fill = beta)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = low_color,
    mid = mid_color,
    high = high_color,
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = limits,
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      barwidth = 1,   #  length of colorbar
      barheight = 20    #  thickness
    )
  ) +
  theme_void() +  #  remove axes, grid, etc.
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )
beta_scale_hor
beta_scale_vert
if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(beta_scale_hor, "beta-scale-hor", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
  panel_save(beta_scale_vert, "beta-scale-vert", "pdf", plot_output_folder)
}
```
# Sliding Window Analyses

## Global phenotypes sliding window
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="200%", out.height="200%"}
global_vars_totest <- c("global_eTIV", "global_SubCortGrayVol","global_CortexVol", "global_CerebralWhiteMatterVol", "global_VentricleChoroidVol","global_SurfaceArea",
                        "global_MeanThickness")
global_sw_ga_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(global_vars_totest)), global_vars_totest)
global_sw_bw_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(global_vars_totest)), global_vars_totest)
global_sw_bwp_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(global_vars_totest)), global_vars_totest)

global_sw_ga <- setNames(lapply(global_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df = df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "gestational_age", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), global_vars_totest)
global_sw_bw <- setNames(lapply(global_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "birth_weight_kg", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), global_vars_totest)

global_sw_bwp <- setNames(lapply(global_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "bweight_percentile", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), global_vars_totest)

## pre-set y - axis limits and convert x-axis to actual age (instead of z-scoring)
mean_age_days = mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)
sd_age_days = sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)
x_breaks <- c((280-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*3+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*6+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*9+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*12+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*15+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*18+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*21+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days)
x_labs <- c("0y","3y","6y","9y","12y","15y","18y","21y")

for (i in 1:length(global_vars_totest)){
  pheno = global_vars_totest[i]
  
  global_sw_ga_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(global_sw_ga[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig))+ 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = " GA Beta (slope)", title = sub("global_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
  
  global_sw_bw_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(global_sw_bw[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BW Beta (slope)", title = sub("global_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
  
  global_sw_bwp_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(global_sw_bwp[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BWp Beta (slope)", title = sub("global_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

global_sw_ga_grid <- wrap_plots(global_sw_ga_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

global_sw_bw_grid <- wrap_plots(global_sw_bw_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

global_sw_bwp_grid <- wrap_plots(global_sw_bwp_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(global_sw_ga_grid, "sliding-global-ga-grid", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 10, plot_height = 12)
panel_save(global_sw_bw_grid, "sliding-global-bw-grid", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 10, plot_height = 12)
panel_save(global_sw_bwp_grid, "sliding-global-bwp-grid", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 10, plot_height = 12)
}

if(save_tables == TRUE){
  saveRDS(global_sw_ga, file = glue("{csv_output_folder}sliding-global-ga.rds"))
  saveRDS(global_sw_bw, file = glue("{csv_output_folder}sliding-global-bw.rds"))
  saveRDS(global_sw_bwp, file = glue("{csv_output_folder}sliding-global-bwp.rds"))
}

global_sw_ga_grid
global_sw_bw_grid
global_sw_bwp_grid
```

## Volumes sliding window
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="400%", out.height="400%"}
ga_vol_vars_totest <- rownames(ga.qc_vol_sig_MC)
bw_vol_vars_totest <- rownames(bw.qc_vol_sig_MC)

vol_sw_ga_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(ga_vol_vars_totest)), ga_vol_vars_totest)
vol_sw_bw_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_vol_vars_totest)), bw_vol_vars_totest)
vol_sw_bwp_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_vol_vars_totest)), bw_vol_vars_totest)

vol_sw_ga <- setNames(lapply(ga_vol_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df = df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "gestational_age", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), ga_vol_vars_totest)
vol_sw_bw <- setNames(lapply(bw_vol_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "birth_weight_kg", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), bw_vol_vars_totest)

vol_sw_bwp <- setNames(lapply(bw_vol_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "bweight_percentile", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), bw_vol_vars_totest)

## pre-set y - axis limits and convert x-axis to actual age (instead of z-scoring)
mean_age_days = mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)
sd_age_days = sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)
x_breaks <- c((280-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*3+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*6+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*9+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*12+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*15+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*18+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*21+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days)
x_labs <- c("0y","3y","6y","9y","12y","15y","18y","21y")

for (i in 1:length(ga_vol_vars_totest)){
  pheno = ga_vol_vars_totest[i]
  
  vol_sw_ga_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(vol_sw_ga[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig))+ 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = " GA Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

for (i in 1:length(bw_vol_vars_totest)){
  pheno = bw_vol_vars_totest[i]
  
  vol_sw_bw_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(vol_sw_bw[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BW Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
  
  vol_sw_bwp_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(vol_sw_bwp[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BWp Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_GrayVol_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

vol_sw_ga_grid <- wrap_plots(vol_sw_ga_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

vol_sw_bw_grid <- wrap_plots(vol_sw_bw_plots) +

panel_save(vol_sw_bw_grid, "sliding-vol-bw-grid", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)

}

  saveRDS(vol_sw_bw, file = glue("{csv_output_folder}sliding-vol-bw.rds"))

}
```

## Surface Area sliding window
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="400%", out.height="400%"}
ga_sa_vars_totest <- rownames(ga.qc_sa_sig_MC)
bw_sa_vars_totest <- rownames(bw.qc_sa_sig_MC)

sa_sw_ga_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(ga_sa_vars_totest)), ga_sa_vars_totest)
sa_sw_bw_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_sa_vars_totest)), bw_sa_vars_totest)
sa_sw_bwp_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_sa_vars_totest)), bw_sa_vars_totest)

sa_sw_ga <- setNames(lapply(ga_sa_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df = df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "gestational_age", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), ga_sa_vars_totest)
sa_sw_bw <- setNames(lapply(bw_sa_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "birth_weight_kg",

}), bw_sa_vars_totest)

  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "bweight_percentile", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), bw_sa_vars_totest)

## pre-set y - axis limits and convert x-axis to actual age (instead of z-scoring)
mean_age_days = mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)
sd_age_days = sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)
x_breaks <- c((280-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*3+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*6+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*9+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*12+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*15+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*18+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*21+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days)
x_labs <- c("0y","3y","6y","9y","12y","15y","18y","21y")

for (i in 1:length(ga_sa_vars_totest)){
  pheno = ga_sa_vars_totest[i]
  
  sa_sw_ga_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(sa_sw_ga[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig))+ 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = " GA Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

for (i in 1:length(bw_sa_vars_totest)){
  pheno = bw_sa_vars_totest[i]
  
  sa_sw_bw_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(sa_sw_bw[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BW Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
  
  sa_sw_bwp_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(sa_sw_bwp[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BWp Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_SurfArea_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

sa_sw_ga_grid <- wrap_plots(sa_sw_ga_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

sa_sw_bw_grid <- wrap_plots(sa_sw_bw_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

sa_sw_bwp_grid <- wrap_plots(sa_sw_bwp_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(sa_sw_ga_grid, "sliding-sa-ga-grid", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
panel_save(sa_sw_bw_grid, "sliding-sa-bw-grid", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
panel_save(sa_sw_bwp_grid, "sliding-sa-bwp-grid", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
}

if(save_tables == TRUE){
  saveRDS(sa_sw_ga, file = glue("{csv_output_folder}sliding-sa-ga.rds"))
  saveRDS(sa_sw_bw, file = glue("{csv_output_folder}sliding-sa-bw.rds"))
  saveRDS(sa_sw_bwp, file = glue("{csv_output_folder}sliding-sa-bwp.rds"))
}

sa_sw_ga_grid
sa_sw_bw_grid
sa_sw_bwp_grid
```

## Cortical Thickness sliding window -- overOne
```{r, echo = FALSE, out.width="400%", out.height="400%"}
ga_th_vars_totest <- rownames(ga.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC)
bw_th_vars_totest <- rownames(bw.qc.overOne_th_sig_MC)

th_sw_ga_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(ga_th_vars_totest)), ga_th_vars_totest)
th_sw_bw_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_th_vars_totest)), bw_th_vars_totest)
th_sw_bwp_plots <- setNames(vector("list", length(bw_th_vars_totest)), bw_th_vars_totest)

th_sw_ga <- setNames(lapply(ga_th_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df = df.zscore_overOne, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "gestational_age", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), ga_th_vars_totest)
th_sw_bw <- setNames(lapply(bw_th_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore_overOne, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "birth_weight_kg", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), bw_th_vars_totest)

th_sw_bwp <- setNames(lapply(bw_th_vars_totest, function(pheno){
  sliding_window_eqsize(df.zscore_overOne, 
                             phenotype = pheno, 
                             pred_var = "bweight_percentile", 
                             age_var = "adjusted_age_in_years",
                             window_size = 750, #
                             overlap = 250) #
}), bw_th_vars_totest)

## pre-set y - axis limits and convert x-axis to actual age (instead of z-scoring)
mean_age_days = mean(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)
sd_age_days = sd(full_df$adjusted_age_in_days)
x_breaks <- c((280-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*3+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days, 
              ((365.25*6+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*9+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*12+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*15+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*18+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days,
              ((365.25*21+280)-mean_age_days)/sd_age_days)
x_labs <- c("0y","3y","6y","9y","12y","15y","18y","21y")

for (i in 1:length(ga_th_vars_totest)){
  pheno = ga_th_vars_totest[i]
  
  th_sw_ga_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(th_sw_ga[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig))+ 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = " GA Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

for (i in 1:length(bw_th_vars_totest)){
  pheno = bw_th_vars_totest[i]
  
  th_sw_bw_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(th_sw_bw[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BW Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
  
  th_sw_bwp_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(th_sw_bwp[[i]], aes(x = mid_age, y = beta, linetype = sig, shape = sig)) + 
    geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labs) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", N)), vjust = -1, size = 1.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Significant" = "solid", "Not Significant" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 21, "Not Significant" = 4)) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "BWp Beta (slope)", title = sub("aparc_ThickAvg_", "", pheno), linetype = "p < 0.05", shape = "p < 0.05") +
  theme_minimal()
}

th_sw_ga_grid <- wrap_plots(th_sw_ga_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

th_sw_bw_grid <- wrap_plots(th_sw_bw_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

th_sw_bwp_grid <- wrap_plots(th_sw_bwp_plots) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = 1, heights = 1.3) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

if(save_figs == TRUE){
panel_save(th_sw_ga_grid, "sliding-th-ga-grid", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
panel_save(th_sw_bw_grid, "sliding-th-bw-grid", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
panel_save(th_sw_bwp_grid, "sliding-th-bwp-grid", "pdf", plot_output_folder, plot_width = 22, plot_height = 16)
}

if(save_tables == TRUE){
  saveRDS(th_sw_ga, file = glue("{csv_output_folder}sliding-th-ga.rds"))
  saveRDS(th_sw_bw, file = glue("{csv_output_folder}sliding-th-bw.rds"))
  saveRDS(th_sw_bwp, file = glue("{csv_output_folder}sliding-th-bwp.rds"))
}

th_sw_ga_grid
th_sw_bw_grid
th_sw_bwp_grid
```
